# IH35 Master Blueprint v3 — Part 8a: Dispatch Module

**Section in v3 hierarchy:** Part 8a of 13. Reads after Part 7 Rev 3 (Foundation Modules). Per Cursor-locked chunking decision (Option 2): Part 8a covers DISPATCH only; Part 8b will cover Driver Finance only; Part 9 will cover Maintenance + Safety + Fuel.

**Status (initial delivery):** Part 8a Dispatch first draft awaiting Cursor strict review.

**Normative language:** MUST · MUST NOT · SHOULD · SHOULD NOT · MAY (RFC 2119).

**Test ID continuation:** Part 8a Dispatch uses T-141.x through T-149.x (T-141..T-149 = 9 series available). Highest test ID before this Part: T-140.11 (Catalogs). Verified non-colliding with all prior parts.

**Trace matrix:** delivered alongside this Part as `IH35_REQUIREMENT_TRACE_MATRIX_V3.csv` (incremental, +N rows for Dispatch).

---

## 8a.0 — DISPATCH MODULE

### 8a.0.1 Element 1: Module overview

**Purpose:** Dispatch owns the operational flow from load creation through settlement. It coordinates loads (the unit of work), stops (the geographic milestones), load_legs (the per-state mileage attribution for IFTA), presettlements (the unfinalized cycle composition), settlements (the finalized payment), and intransit_issues (the in-flight problem queue). The geofence state machine is the heart of dispatch — every stop has a state transition history, and the source attribution (geofence vs PWA vs dispatcher_manual) determines which detention/dwell policies apply.

**Owning schema:** `dispatch` (per Part 4.4).

**Key invariants:**
- Load `presettlement_uuid` MUST be populated when `status = 'settled' OR 'invoiced'` (per Part 4.4.2.1).
- Load assigned to a unit MUST also have an assigned driver (per Part 4.4.2.2 — dispatch atomicity).
- Stop sequence integrity: at any time exactly one stop has `state IN ('en_route','arrived','checked_in','loading','loaded','unloading','unloaded')` per load (per Part 4.4.2.3 — single in-flight stop).
- `load_stop_events` is append-only; corrections are NEW events with `transitioned_by_source = 'correction'` referencing the prior event in `correction_reason` (per Part 4.4.2.4).
- Border-routing decision: `border_routing` MUST be set BEFORE settlement; default is `pending`; `presettlement.compose()` blocks if any border-crossing load has `border_routing = 'pending'` (per Part 4.4.2.5 + WF-014).
- Presettlement `composition_locked_at` is one-way: once locked, lines cannot be added/removed except by Owner via `presettlement.unlock()` action (WF-064; see also Part 4.5 driver_finance contract — this is dispatch-side enforcement of finance-side rule).
- Settlement `posted_at` is one-way: once posted, the settlement record is immutable; corrections require a reverse-and-replace pattern via Owner action (WF-064).

**Cross-module dependencies:**
- READS from: `master_data.units` (assigned_unit_uuid), `master_data.drivers` (assigned_driver_uuid), `master_data.customers` (customer_uuid), `master_data.locations` (load_stops.location_uuid), `catalogs.us_states` (load_legs origin/dest), `master_data.equipment` (assigned_trailer_uuid), `catalogs.classes` (per-unit accounting class)
- WRITES to: `accounting.invoices` (canonical reference; load.invoice_uuid links to it; created via `accounting.create_invoice_from_load()`), `accounting.bills` (canonical reference; load.driver_bill_uuid links to driver-bill created via `accounting.create_driver_bill_from_load()` per WF-039)
- WRITES via service functions (NOT direct cross-schema write) to: `driver_finance.driver_liabilities` (when border_routing='deduct_from_driver' creates a liability), `driver_finance.escrow_ledger` (when settlement applies escrow contribution), `driver_finance.driver_advances` (when settlement closes an advance)
- READS for trigger logic: `maintenance.work_orders` (for WF-044 maintenance-due alert on assignment), `safety.driver_hos_status` (Samsara mirror for assignment safety check), `documents.evidence_records` (BOL, POD, scale tickets per WF-040)
- WRITES to: `audit.audit_events` via `audit.append_event()` (every state change)
- WRITES to: `outbox.queue` (for QBO sync of invoices created via WF-039 + WF-040; for Samsara geofence-correlation telemetry write-back if configured)

**WFs implemented in this Part:**
- WF-013 Driver Pay Catalog Application
- WF-014 Border Crossing Charge Routing
- WF-039 Load Create Auto Driver Bill
- WF-040 Factoring Packet Generation on Load Close
- WF-041 Presettlement→Settlement Lifecycle
- WF-042 Company Settlement Profitability
- WF-043 Geofence/Delay Analytics
- WF-044 Dispatch Maintenance Due Alert (dispatch-side; maintenance owns the WO half — Part 9)
- WF-048 PWA In-Transit Issue (dispatch-side; PWA covers driver app half — Part 12)
- WF-049 Convert In-Transit Issue to Work Order (dispatch-side initiation; maintenance owns conversion — Part 9)
- WF-051 Driver Load Acceptance Offline (dispatch-side acceptance recording; PWA owns offline sync — Part 12)
- WF-052 NB/SB Cycle Tracking
- WF-053 Multi-Stop Load Composition

### 8a.0.2 Element 2: UI behaviors

#### 8a.0.2.1 Loads list (`/dispatch/loads`)

**MUST 8a.0.2.1.1 — Section header band:** "DISPATCH" per Part 6.2.3.

**MUST 8a.0.2.1.2 — Sub-tabs:** Active, Pending, Completed, Cancelled, All. Default tab is Active. URL-encoded as `?status_filter=active`.

**MUST 8a.0.2.1.3 — KPI cards row** per Part 6.2.4 (single-row 30px height): active loads count, loads in-transit, loads at risk (any stop late >2h or HOS warning or maintenance due — yellow `roadside` band per Part 6.4.4), loads needing border-routing decision (yellow `roadside` band; clicking jumps to filtered list), loads ready to settle (green `escrow` band).

**MUST 8a.0.2.1.4 — Filters:** customer (multi-select typeahead from `master_data.customers`), assigned driver (typeahead), assigned unit (typeahead), status, has_border_crossing toggle, NB/SB direction filter (per WF-052), date range on `pickup_scheduled_at`.

**MUST 8a.0.2.1.5 — Table columns:** load_number (display_id), customer_short_name, pickup_city/state, delivery_city/state, assigned_driver display_id (with HOS badge per WF-038 — green=available, yellow=approaching limit, red=violation), assigned_unit display_id (with PM-due badge if applicable per WF-044), status badge per Part 6.4.8, pickup_at / delivery_at relative time, current_stop_state badge (e.g. "EN ROUTE TO PICKUP", "LOADING", "EN ROUTE TO DELIVERY"), revenue, factoring_status badge, actions hover dropdown.

**MUST 8a.0.2.1.6 — Border-crossing flag visualization:** loads with `has_border_crossing=true` AND `border_routing='pending'` show the gold `roadside` color band per Part 6.4.4 on the row + a "Routing decision needed" badge. Once `border_routing` is set to one of the 3 finalized values (charge_to_customer, deduct_from_driver, pay_to_driver), the band clears.

**MUST 8a.0.2.1.7 — Actions hover dropdown:** view detail, edit (limited fields), assign driver (lightning-bolt ⚡ if maintenance due — WF-044), assign unit (same lightning-bolt rule), set border-routing (WF-014; lightning-bolt ⚡ when 'deduct_from_driver' selected — creates driver liability), close load (WF-040; lightning-bolt ⚡ — generates factoring packet + invoice), cancel load (WF-064 — destructive), view audit history.

#### 8a.0.2.2 Load detail (`/dispatch/loads/{uuid}`)

**MUST 8a.0.2.2.1 — Tabs:** Overview, Stops, Driver Pay, Documents, Settlement, Geofence Timeline, Audit.

**MUST 8a.0.2.2.2 — Overview tab fields:** load_number (read-only), customer (link), assigned_driver (link), assigned_unit + assigned_trailer (links), revenue, status, has_border_crossing + border_routing, pickup/delivery scheduled times, current stop state, percent complete, NB/SB direction (per WF-052).

**MUST 8a.0.2.2.3 — Stops tab:** ordered list of `dispatch.load_stops` with stop_sequence, stop_type badge (pickup, delivery, intermediate, border_crossing, fuel, rest), location_name + address, scheduled times, actual times (with source-attribution badge per WF-043: geofence/PWA/manual), state badge per stop, extra_rate per stop (for multi-stop pricing per WF-053). Add Stop button (lightning-bolt ⚡ if it changes pricing — affects driver pay).

**MUST 8a.0.2.2.4 — Driver Pay tab:** displays the load's driver pay computation per WF-013 — line items from the driver_pay_catalog: base linehaul, mileage component, stop pay, layover pay, detention pay, border-crossing line (only if border_routing='pay_to_driver'), fuel surcharge if applicable. Read-only display; the catalog rules are managed in Catalogs module (Part 7) and may be re-applied to a load via "Recompute pay" button (WF-064 — recomputing after settlement is high-risk; Owner-only).

**MUST 8a.0.2.2.5 — Documents tab:** lists associated `documents.evidence_records` with type filters (BOL, POD, scale_ticket, lumper_receipt, accident_photo, damage_photo, fuel_receipt). Upload button per Part 5.4 chain-of-custody R2 active bucket. The factoring packet bundle (per WF-040) requires BOL + POD; this tab shows packet-readiness status.

**MUST 8a.0.2.2.6 — Settlement tab:** if load is presettled or settled, displays the linked `dispatch.presettlements` and `dispatch.settlements` records with balance breakdown. If unsettled, displays the projected pay (driver pay tab repeated) + a "Compose presettlement" button that's enabled only when ALL stops are completed AND border_routing != 'pending'.

**MUST 8a.0.2.2.7 — Geofence Timeline tab (per WF-043):** chronological visualization of every `load_stop_events` row. Each event shown as a timeline entry with: timestamp, stop_sequence + stop_name, from→to state, source-attribution badge (geofence/PWA/manual/correction), and a JSON-collapsed `geofence_correlation_json` that expands on click. Shows dwell time per stop (computed from arrived_at to departed_at). Detention threshold line (gold `roadside` band per Part 6.4.4) drawn at customer's configured `arrival_dwell_threshold_seconds` per Part 7.2.2.7.3. Layover beyond 8h shows red `severe` band per Part 6.4.4.

#### 8a.0.2.3 Load create (`/dispatch/loads/create`)

**MUST 8a.0.2.3.1 — Form layout:** single-column form, 800px wide modal per Part 6.4.5.1 `md` size.

**MUST 8a.0.2.3.2 — Required fields:** customer (typeahead, required), pickup_location (typeahead from master_data.locations, required), delivery_location (typeahead, required), pickup_scheduled_at (datetime picker, required), delivery_scheduled_at (datetime picker, required), revenue (decimal, required), driver_pay_catalog_uuid (typeahead from catalogs, required for WF-013), assigned_driver_uuid (typeahead from active drivers; optional at create — can assign later), assigned_unit_uuid (typeahead; optional at create — but if set, requires driver also set per 4.4.2.2), assigned_trailer_uuid (typeahead from equipment with trailer type; optional).

**MUST 8a.0.2.3.3 — Border-crossing detection:** if pickup_location OR delivery_location has `is_border_crossing=true` (from `master_data.locations`), system AUTO-SETS `has_border_crossing=true` and shows a "Routing decision required by settlement" banner. The `border_routing` field defaults to `pending` and a dropdown is shown for explicit selection (charge_to_customer / deduct_from_driver / pay_to_driver / pending).

**MUST 8a.0.2.3.4 — Multi-stop add (per WF-053):** "Add intermediate stop" button shows a sub-form for stop_sequence, stop_type, location, scheduled times, and extra_rate. Multiple intermediate stops allowed; system validates total stop_sequence ordering uniquely.

**MUST 8a.0.2.3.5 — NB/SB direction selector (per WF-052):** dropdown for `direction IN ('northbound','southbound','mixed','n/a')`. Auto-suggested based on origin/destination state pairings (e.g. TX→IL = NB; CA→TX = SB) but user-overridable.

**MUST 8a.0.2.3.6 — Save action:** primary button per Part 6.4.2.1. On success, modal closes with success toast per Part 6.4.6 ("Load L-XXXX created"). If `assigned_driver_uuid` set AND `assigned_unit_uuid` set, system fires `accounting.create_driver_bill_from_load()` per WF-039 (auto driver-bill on save).

**MUST 8a.0.2.3.7 — WF-044 Maintenance-due check:** when `assigned_unit_uuid` is selected at create OR via subsequent assignment, the system queries `maintenance.work_orders` (canonical reference read) for any open PM-due WO on that unit. If found, a warning modal appears: "Unit T032 has maintenance scheduled in 2 days (PM-180k). Continue with assignment?" with "Continue" + "Cancel" buttons. The continue action fires `dispatch.assignment_with_maintenance_warning` audit event (info — operational warning, NOT WF-064).

#### 8a.0.2.4 Border-routing decision modal (`/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/border-routing`)

**MUST 8a.0.2.4.1 — Modal trigger:** opens from the "Routing decision needed" banner (per 8a.0.2.1.6) OR from the load detail Overview tab "Set border routing" button.

**MUST 8a.0.2.4.2 — Layout:** 4 large radio cards (one per `border_routing` value): "Charge to customer" (adds invoice line), "Deduct from driver" (creates driver liability — WF-064 ⚡), "Pay to driver" (adds line to driver pay), "Pending" (default; defer decision). Each card explains the financial impact in plain language.

**MUST 8a.0.2.4.3 — 'Deduct from driver' confirmation per Part 6.4.5.4:** when this option selected, 2-step confirmation appears: "This will create a $XXX driver liability on driver D-0042. The driver will see this in their next settlement and may dispute." Step 2 requires reason ≥20 chars + typed phrase "DEDUCT".

**MUST 8a.0.2.4.4 — Save action:** populates `border_routing`, `border_routing_set_at`, `border_routing_set_by_user_id`. If `deduct_from_driver` selected, fires the cross-module `driver_finance.create_liability_from_border_routing()` service function in same transaction (per WF-014).

#### 8a.0.2.5 Stops detail panel (`/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/stops/{stop_uuid}`)

**MUST 8a.0.2.5.1** — Side-panel slides in from right (480px wide); does NOT navigate away from load detail. Shows full stop record + chronological event log.

**MUST 8a.0.2.5.2 — Manual state correction:** "Override state" button (lightning-bolt ⚡ — corrections of past state are an audit event with `transitioned_by_source='correction'`). Modal requires: from_state (pre-filled), to_state (dropdown), reason (≥20 chars), corrected_at (datetime picker). Save creates a new `dispatch.load_stop_events` row with `transitioned_by_source='correction'`. Does NOT modify the prior event (append-only per 4.4.2.4).

#### 8a.0.2.6 Presettlement composer (`/dispatch/presettlements/create`)

**MUST 8a.0.2.6.1 — Driver picker:** typeahead from drivers with `status='active'` AND at least one delivered-but-unsettled load.

**MUST 8a.0.2.6.2 — Loads multi-select:** checkbox list of unsettled loads for the driver, auto-checked if status='delivered'. User can uncheck to defer specific loads to next cycle.

**MUST 8a.0.2.6.3 — Pre-composition validation banner:** if any selected load has `has_border_crossing=true AND border_routing='pending'`, banner shows: "X load(s) have unresolved border-routing decisions. Resolve before composing presettlement." Compose button disabled until resolved.

**MUST 8a.0.2.6.4 — Composition preview:** real-time computed table showing per-load gross pay, deduction lines pulled from `driver_finance.deduction_schedules` (cross-module read), escrow contribution per Part 4.5.3 escrow rules, advance closures, pending acknowledgment liabilities (per Part 6.8.2 enumeration item 17). Shows net pay total prominently.

**MUST 8a.0.2.6.5 — Compose action:** primary button per Part 6.4.2.1; creates `dispatch.presettlements` row, links selected loads via `presettlement_uuid`, fires `dispatch.presettlement_composed` audit event (info). Does NOT lock the composition yet — user must explicitly lock to advance to settlement.

#### 8a.0.2.7 Presettlement detail (`/dispatch/presettlements/{uuid}`)

**MUST 8a.0.2.7.1 — Header:** displays driver, cycle dates, total gross, total deductions, escrow contribution, net pay, status (composed / locked / settled).

**MUST 8a.0.2.7.2 — Composition table:** per-load breakdown with editable deduction-hold toggles per WF-012 (held deductions excluded from THIS cycle). Holding a deduction shows a warning per 6.4.4 yellow `roadside` band: "Deduction held; will retry next cycle. Reason required."

**MUST 8a.0.2.7.3 — Lock action:** primary button "Lock composition" per Part 6.4.2.1. After lock, composition cannot be modified except by Owner. Sets `composition_locked_at`. Lock action shows confirmation modal: "After locking, lines cannot be added/removed except via Owner unlock action. Proceed?"

**MUST 8a.0.2.7.4 — Unlock action (WF-064 ⚡):** Owner-only. 2-step confirmation per Part 6.4.5.4 with reason ≥20 chars + typed phrase "UNLOCK PRESETTLEMENT". Fires `dispatch.presettlement_unlocked` warning + WF-064 Owner notification.

**MUST 8a.0.2.7.5 — Settle action:** primary "Settle and pay" button enabled only when locked. Opens settlement composition modal (next subsection).

#### 8a.0.2.8 Settlement composition (`/dispatch/settlements/create`)

**MUST 8a.0.2.8.1** — Modal opened from a locked presettlement. Shows final-pay breakdown (read-only from presettlement) + payment method picker (check / ACH / advance-application). For ACH, shows the driver's vendor.bank_account_last4 from `master_data.vendors` (decryption requires Owner+Admin per 7.2.5).

**MUST 8a.0.2.8.2 — Post action (WF-064 ⚡):** lightning-bolt; fires posting per Part 4.6 accounting service function. Posting is one-way (settlement is immutable after posted_at). 2-step confirmation per Part 6.4.5.4 with reason + typed "POST SETTLEMENT".

#### 8a.0.2.9 In-transit issues queue (`/dispatch/intransit-issues`)

**MUST 8a.0.2.9.1 — KPI cards:** open issues count, issues by category breakdown (mechanical / safety / customer / route / other), issues converted to WO this week (WF-049 throughput).

**MUST 8a.0.2.9.2 — Table:** per `dispatch.intransit_issues` row: issue_id, driver, unit, load_number (link), category, severity badge (info/warning/critical), captured_at, resolution_status, actions.

**MUST 8a.0.2.9.3 — Convert to WO action (per WF-049):** opens a modal that lets the office user pick WO type (PM / Repair / Tire / Accident) and confirms conversion. Fires `dispatch.intransit_issue_converted_to_wo` event + cross-module `maintenance.create_work_order_from_issue()` service call.

**MUST 8a.0.2.9.4 — Mark resolved without WO:** for issues that don't need a work order (e.g. customer disputed but resolved at site). Requires resolution_note ≥20 chars.

#### 8a.0.2.10 NB/SB Cycle dashboard (`/dispatch/cycles`)

**MUST 8a.0.2.10.1** — Per WF-052: dashboard view of NB vs SB cycles per driver. Shows trips per direction, average revenue per direction, average cycle days. Filters by driver, date range. Read-only analytics view.

#### 8a.0.2.11 PWA load offers (driver app — partial; full PWA in Part 12)

**MUST 8a.0.2.11.1** — Dispatch-side: offers a load to a driver via push notification with a deep link to PWA `/loads/offer/{uuid}`. The acceptance/decline writeback is via `POST /api/pwa/loads/{uuid}/respond` (specced below).

**MUST 8a.0.2.11.2 — Per WF-051 offline acceptance:** the API endpoint accepts an `offline_response_at` timestamp from the PWA payload. If the driver was offline at response time, the PWA queues the response locally and replays on reconnect with the original timestamp. The dispatch-side stores both `responded_at` (server time) and `offline_response_at` (driver-app time) for audit clarity.

### 8a.0.3 Element 3: Data entities

The Dispatch module owns these tables (DDL in Part 4.4.1, NOT redefined here):

- `dispatch.loads` — the load record; one per dispatched movement
- `dispatch.load_stops` — pickup, delivery, intermediate, border_crossing, fuel, rest stops
- `dispatch.load_stop_events` — append-only state-transition log (the geofence/PWA/manual source-of-truth)
- `dispatch.load_legs` — per-state mileage attribution for IFTA (per Part 3.14.4.4)
- `dispatch.presettlements` — unfinalized cycle composition (the staging area before settlement)
- `dispatch.settlements` — finalized payment record (immutable after posted_at)
- `dispatch.intransit_issues` — driver-reported in-flight problem queue (per WF-048)

The Dispatch module reads from these canonical reference tables in other schemas:
- `master_data.units` — assigned_unit_uuid
- `master_data.drivers` — assigned_driver_uuid + via presettlement composition
- `master_data.customers` — customer_uuid
- `master_data.locations` — load_stops.location_uuid + border-crossing detection
- `master_data.equipment` — assigned_trailer_uuid + tablet/equipment for in-transit issues
- `catalogs.us_states` — load_legs origin/destination
- `catalogs.classes` — per-unit accounting class for WF-039 driver bill creation
- `accounting.invoices` — load.invoice_uuid (via WF-040 packet generation)
- `accounting.bills` — load.driver_bill_uuid (via WF-039 auto driver-bill)
- `maintenance.work_orders` — for WF-044 PM-due check on assignment
- `safety.driver_hos_status` — for HOS badge display + assignment-blocking on critical violations
- `documents.evidence_records` — BOL, POD, scale tickets, accident photos for the Documents tab
- `driver_finance.deduction_schedules` — for presettlement composition
- `driver_finance.escrow_ledger` — for settlement escrow contribution
- `driver_finance.driver_advances` — for settlement advance closures
- `driver_finance.driver_liabilities` — for pending acknowledgment count surfacing in presettlement banner

The Dispatch module writes via cross-module service functions to:
- `accounting.create_invoice_from_load()` — per WF-040
- `accounting.create_driver_bill_from_load()` — per WF-039
- `driver_finance.create_liability_from_border_routing()` — per WF-014 deduct_from_driver path
- `driver_finance.recompute_driver_debt()` — synchronously called at presettlement composition (per Part 4.5.4 transactional debt authority)
- `maintenance.create_work_order_from_issue()` — per WF-049
- `audit.append_event()` — every state change
- `outbox.queue` — for invoice-side QBO sync via accounting.create_invoice_from_load()

**No new tables introduced beyond Part 4.4 DDL.** Schema lock per Part 4 Rev 2 honored.

### 8a.0.4 Element 4: API contracts

Following the Contract Profile pattern from Part 7.3.4.1 — high-risk WF-064 endpoints and novel multi-step workflows get FULL specs in this Element 4; standard CRUD and read-only endpoints are mapped via Contract Profile assignments in §8a.0.4.1.

#### `POST /api/dispatch/loads`

Create a new load. If `assigned_driver_uuid` AND `assigned_unit_uuid` are set, fires WF-039 auto-create driver bill in same transaction.

**Authentication:** Active session cookie.

**Permission:** `dispatch.load.create` (Owner, Admin, Manager, Dispatcher per role matrix 8a.0.7).

**Example request:**
```http
POST /api/dispatch/loads
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "customer_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000cust042",
  "pickup_location_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000loc0001",
  "delivery_location_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000loc0099",
  "pickup_scheduled_at": "2026-05-04T08:00:00Z",
  "delivery_scheduled_at": "2026-05-05T16:00:00Z",
  "revenue": 2850.00,
  "driver_pay_catalog_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000pcat001",
  "assigned_driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042",
  "assigned_unit_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000t032",
  "assigned_trailer_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000eqtr001",
  "direction": "northbound",
  "intermediate_stops": []
}
```

**Example success response (201):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000load001",
    "load_number": "L-25001",
    "status": "scheduled",
    "has_border_crossing": false,
    "border_routing": null,
    "stops_count": 2,
    "driver_bill_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000bill001",
    "wf_039_driver_bill_created": true,
    "wf_044_maintenance_warnings": [],
    "created_at": "2026-05-02T20:00:00Z",
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi20",
    "transaction_summary": {
      "load_inserted": true,
      "stops_inserted": 2,
      "driver_bill_inserted": true,
      "all_in_single_transaction": true,
      "qbo_outbox_queued": true
    }
  }
}
```

**Example success response with border-crossing detected (201):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000load002",
    "load_number": "L-25002",
    "status": "scheduled",
    "has_border_crossing": true,
    "border_routing": "pending",
    "border_routing_decision_required": true,
    "stops_count": 3,
    "driver_bill_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000bill002",
    "wf_039_driver_bill_created": true,
    "wf_044_maintenance_warnings": [
      {"unit_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000t015", "wo_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000wo0042", "wo_type": "pm_180k", "due_date": "2026-05-04"}
    ],
    "created_at": "2026-05-02T20:05:00Z",
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi21"
  }
}
```

**Example validation error response (400):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_VALIDATION",
    "message": "Load creation request invalid",
    "details": [
      {"field": "delivery_scheduled_at", "reason": "must be after pickup_scheduled_at"},
      {"field": "revenue", "reason": "must be > 0"},
      {"field": "assigned_driver_uuid", "reason": "required when assigned_unit_uuid is set (per Part 4.4.2.2 dispatch atomicity)"}
    ],
    "request_id": "req_01923ce0"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (409, driver HOS violation):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_DRIVER_HOS_VIOLATION",
    "message": "Driver D-0042 currently has an HOS violation; assignment blocked. Resolve violation or reassign.",
    "details": {
      "driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042",
      "violation_type": "drive_time_exceeded",
      "violation_at": "2026-05-02T18:30:00Z",
      "samsara_link": "https://cloud.samsara.com/..."
    },
    "request_id": "req_01923ce0"
  }
}
```

**Example permission error response (403):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PERMISSION_DENIED",
    "message": "Action 'dispatch.load.create' requires Owner, Administrator, Manager, or Dispatcher role",
    "details": {"caller_role": "accountant"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce0"
  }
}
```

**Error code linkage:** `E_VALIDATION`, `E_DRIVER_HOS_VIOLATION` (8a.0.10.1), `E_DRIVER_INACTIVE` (8a.0.10.1), `E_UNIT_RETIRED` (8a.0.10.1), `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`. On success, emits `dispatch.load_created` (info) + `accounting.driver_bill_created` (info, if WF-039 fired) atomically. WF-044 maintenance warnings are advisory only and do NOT block creation; they are returned in the response payload for the UI to surface.

---

#### `POST /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/border-routing`

Set the border-routing decision. **Fires WF-064 when `border_routing='deduct_from_driver'`** (creates driver liability per WF-014 + Part 6.8.2 enumeration touchpoint).

**Authentication:** Active session cookie.

**Permission:** `dispatch.load.set_border_routing` (Owner, Admin, Manager, Dispatcher) for non-deduct values; `dispatch.load.set_border_routing.deduct` (Owner, Admin only) for deduct_from_driver value.

**Example request (charge_to_customer — non-WF-064 path):**
```http
POST /api/dispatch/loads/01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000load002/border-routing
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "border_routing": "charge_to_customer",
  "reason": "Customer agreed to absorb border-crossing fee per signed addendum"
}
```

**Example request (deduct_from_driver — WF-064 path):**
```http
POST /api/dispatch/loads/01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000load002/border-routing
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "border_routing": "deduct_from_driver",
  "reason": "Driver caused unscheduled detour resulting in extra border-crossing fee per dispatcher report",
  "amount_to_deduct": 125.00
}
```

**Example success response (200, charge_to_customer):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "load_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000load002",
    "border_routing": "charge_to_customer",
    "border_routing_set_at": "2026-05-02T20:15:00Z",
    "border_routing_set_by_user_id": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000usr01",
    "invoice_line_added": true,
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi22",
    "wf_064_owner_notification": {"fired": false}
  }
}
```

**Example success response (200, deduct_from_driver — WF-064 fires):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "load_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000load002",
    "border_routing": "deduct_from_driver",
    "border_routing_set_at": "2026-05-02T20:20:00Z",
    "border_routing_set_by_user_id": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000usr01",
    "driver_liability_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000lia0001",
    "driver_liability_amount": 125.00,
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi23",
    "wf_064_owner_notification": {"fired": true, "notification_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000notif07"}
  }
}
```

**Example validation error response (400):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_VALIDATION",
    "message": "Border-routing request invalid",
    "details": [
      {"field": "border_routing", "reason": "must be one of: charge_to_customer, deduct_from_driver, pay_to_driver, pending"},
      {"field": "amount_to_deduct", "reason": "required and > 0 when border_routing='deduct_from_driver'"},
      {"field": "reason", "reason": "required; minimum 20 characters when border_routing='deduct_from_driver'"}
    ],
    "request_id": "req_01923ce1"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (422, load lacks border-crossing flag):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_LOAD_NOT_BORDER_CROSSING",
    "message": "Load does not have has_border_crossing=true; border-routing is not applicable",
    "details": {"has_border_crossing": false},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce1"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (409, load already settled):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_LOAD_ALREADY_SETTLED",
    "message": "Cannot modify border-routing on a settled load. Use Owner correction flow.",
    "details": {"load_status": "settled", "settled_at": "2026-04-25T12:00:00Z"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce1"
  }
}
```

**Example permission error response (403):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PERMISSION_DENIED",
    "message": "Action 'dispatch.load.set_border_routing.deduct' requires Owner or Administrator role (deduct_from_driver path only)",
    "details": {"caller_role": "manager", "border_routing_requested": "deduct_from_driver"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce1"
  }
}
```

**Error code linkage:** `E_VALIDATION`, `E_LOAD_NOT_BORDER_CROSSING` (8a.0.10.1), `E_LOAD_ALREADY_SETTLED` (8a.0.10.1), `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`. On success (charge_to_customer / pay_to_driver / pending), emits `dispatch.border_routing_set` (info). On success (deduct_from_driver), emits `dispatch.border_routing_set_deduct_executed` (warning, fires WF-064) + cross-module `driver_finance.liability_created` (info, owned by driver_finance). On block of the deduct path, emits `dispatch.border_routing_set_deduct_blocked` (warning, fires WF-064 — success/blocked symmetry per Part 6.8.3).

---

#### `POST /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/close`

Close a load (delivered → invoice + factoring packet per WF-040).

**Authentication:** Active session cookie.

**Permission:** `dispatch.load.close` (Owner, Admin, Manager, Dispatcher).

**Example request:**
```http
POST /api/dispatch/loads/01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000load001/close
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "delivery_evidence_uuids": [
    "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000evid003",
    "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000evid004"
  ],
  "delivery_notes": "Delivered on time; recipient signed",
  "generate_factoring_packet": true
}
```

**Example success response (200):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "load_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000load001",
    "load_status": "delivered",
    "invoice_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000inv0001",
    "invoice_number": "INV-25001",
    "factoring_packet_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000fpkt001",
    "factoring_packet_documents_count": 4,
    "delivery_completed_at": "2026-05-05T15:30:00Z",
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi24",
    "transaction_summary": {
      "load_status_updated": true,
      "invoice_inserted": true,
      "factoring_packet_assembled": true,
      "qbo_outbox_queued": true
    }
  }
}
```

**Example validation error response (400):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_VALIDATION",
    "message": "Load close request invalid",
    "details": [
      {"field": "delivery_evidence_uuids", "reason": "at least one BOL document required"},
      {"field": "delivery_evidence_uuids", "reason": "at least one POD document required for factoring_packet"}
    ],
    "request_id": "req_01923ce2"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (422, stops not complete):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_LOAD_STOPS_INCOMPLETE",
    "message": "Cannot close load with incomplete stops. 1 stop has not reached 'departed' state.",
    "details": {
      "incomplete_stops": [
        {"stop_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000stop002", "stop_sequence": 2, "current_state": "loading"}
      ]
    },
    "request_id": "req_01923ce2"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (422, border routing pending):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_BORDER_ROUTING_PENDING",
    "message": "Load has has_border_crossing=true but border_routing='pending'. Set routing decision before closing.",
    "details": {"border_routing": "pending"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce2"
  }
}
```

**Example permission error response (403):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PERMISSION_DENIED",
    "message": "Action 'dispatch.load.close' requires Owner, Administrator, Manager, or Dispatcher role",
    "details": {"caller_role": "driver"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce2"
  }
}
```

**Error code linkage:** `E_VALIDATION`, `E_LOAD_STOPS_INCOMPLETE` (8a.0.10.1), `E_BORDER_ROUTING_PENDING` (8a.0.10.1), `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`. On success, emits `dispatch.load_closed` (info) + `accounting.invoice_created` (info, owned by accounting via cross-module service call) + `dispatch.factoring_packet_assembled` (info) atomically. The factoring packet bundle is queued for delivery via documents module (Part 9 Documents — TBD).

---

#### `POST /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/cancel`

Cancel a load. **Fires WF-064 — destructive action on financial state.**

**Authentication:** Active session cookie.

**Permission:** `dispatch.load.cancel` (Owner, Admin, Manager).

**Example request:**
```http
POST /api/dispatch/loads/01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000load001/cancel
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "reason": "Customer cancelled load due to inventory shortage; no driver pay or fees apply per cancellation clause in MSA",
  "reverse_driver_bill": true
}
```

**Example success response (200):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "load_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000load001",
    "load_status": "cancelled",
    "cancelled_at": "2026-05-02T20:30:00Z",
    "driver_bill_reversed": true,
    "driver_bill_uuid_reversed": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000bill001",
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi25",
    "wf_064_owner_notification": {"fired": true, "notification_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000notif08"}
  }
}
```

**Example validation error response (400):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_VALIDATION",
    "message": "Cancel request invalid",
    "details": [{"field": "reason", "reason": "required; minimum 20 characters"}],
    "request_id": "req_01923ce3"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (422, load already settled):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_LOAD_ALREADY_SETTLED",
    "message": "Cannot cancel a settled load. Use Owner reverse-and-replace settlement flow.",
    "details": {"load_status": "settled"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce3"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (409, load in-transit with stops checked-in):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_LOAD_IN_TRANSIT_NOT_CANCELLABLE_INLINE",
    "message": "Load is in-transit (stop is checked_in or further). Cancellation requires Owner action with disposition for in-progress work.",
    "details": {"load_status": "en_route", "current_stop_state": "checked_in"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce3"
  }
}
```

**Example permission error response (403):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PERMISSION_DENIED",
    "message": "Action 'dispatch.load.cancel' requires Owner, Administrator, or Manager role",
    "details": {"caller_role": "dispatcher"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce3"
  }
}
```

**Error code linkage:** `E_VALIDATION`, `E_LOAD_ALREADY_SETTLED` (8a.0.10.1), `E_LOAD_IN_TRANSIT_NOT_CANCELLABLE_INLINE` (8a.0.10.1), `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`. On success, emits `dispatch.load_cancelled` (warning, fires WF-064). On block, emits `dispatch.load_cancellation_blocked` (warning, fires WF-064 — success/blocked symmetry).

---

#### `POST /api/dispatch/load-stops/{uuid}/state-transition`

Transition a stop's state. Source attribution determines downstream KPI computation per WF-043. Manual transitions by office user are allowed; corrections of past states use this endpoint with `correction_reason` set.

**Authentication:** Active session cookie OR Samsara webhook signature OR PWA session cookie.

**Permission:** `dispatch.load_stop.transition` for office user; `dispatch.load_stop.transition.geofence` for Samsara webhook; `dispatch.load_stop.transition.pwa` for assigned driver via PWA.

**Example request (dispatcher manual transition):**
```http
POST /api/dispatch/load-stops/01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000stop001/state-transition
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "to_state": "arrived",
  "transitioned_at": "2026-05-04T08:15:00Z",
  "source": "dispatcher_manual",
  "reason_optional": "Driver radioed in arrival; geofence not registering"
}
```

**Example request (correction of past state):**
```http
POST /api/dispatch/load-stops/01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000stop001/state-transition
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "to_state": "departed",
  "transitioned_at": "2026-05-04T11:30:00Z",
  "source": "correction",
  "correction_reason": "PWA failed to sync departure event; correcting from driver's text-message confirmation"
}
```

**Example success response (200):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "load_stop_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000stevt01",
    "load_stop_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000stop001",
    "from_state": "scheduled",
    "to_state": "arrived",
    "transitioned_at": "2026-05-04T08:15:00Z",
    "transitioned_by_source": "dispatcher_manual",
    "transitioned_by_user_id": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000usr01",
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi26"
  }
}
```

**Example validation error response (400):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_VALIDATION",
    "message": "State transition request invalid",
    "details": [
      {"field": "to_state", "reason": "must be one of: scheduled, en_route, arrived, checked_in, loading, loaded, unloading, unloaded, departed, skipped"},
      {"field": "correction_reason", "reason": "required when source='correction'; minimum 20 characters"}
    ],
    "request_id": "req_01923ce4"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (422, single-in-flight invariant):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_STOP_SEQUENCE_VIOLATION",
    "message": "Another stop on this load is currently in-flight (state=loading). Complete that stop first or transition it to 'departed'.",
    "details": {
      "in_flight_stop_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000stop002",
      "in_flight_stop_state": "loading"
    },
    "request_id": "req_01923ce4"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (422, invalid state transition):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_STOP_STATE_TRANSITION_INVALID",
    "message": "Cannot transition from 'departed' to 'loading'. State machine forbids backward transitions except via source='correction'.",
    "details": {"from_state": "departed", "to_state": "loading", "source": "dispatcher_manual"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce4"
  }
}
```

**Example permission error response (403):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PERMISSION_DENIED",
    "message": "Action 'dispatch.load_stop.transition' requires Owner, Administrator, Manager, or Dispatcher role",
    "details": {"caller_role": "accountant"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce4"
  }
}
```

**Error code linkage:** `E_VALIDATION`, `E_STOP_SEQUENCE_VIOLATION` (8a.0.10.1), `E_STOP_STATE_TRANSITION_INVALID` (8a.0.10.1), `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`. On success, emits `dispatch.stop_transitioned` (info, sampled 10% for non-correction; always recorded for source='correction'). For corrections, additionally emits `dispatch.stop_state_corrected` (warning) — corrections affect KPI calculations and audit trail.

---

#### `POST /api/dispatch/presettlements/compose`

Compose a presettlement for a driver from completed loads. Synchronously calls `driver_finance.recompute_driver_debt()` per Part 4.5.4 transactional debt authority.

**Authentication:** Active session cookie.

**Permission:** `dispatch.presettlement.compose` (Owner, Admin, Manager, Accountant).

**Example request:**
```http
POST /api/dispatch/presettlements/compose
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042",
  "cycle_start_date": "2026-04-26",
  "cycle_end_date": "2026-05-02",
  "load_uuids": [
    "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000load001",
    "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000load002"
  ],
  "deduction_holds": []
}
```

**Example success response (201):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "presettlement_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000pset001",
    "driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042",
    "cycle_start_date": "2026-04-26",
    "cycle_end_date": "2026-05-02",
    "load_count": 2,
    "gross_pay": 1850.00,
    "deductions_total": 412.50,
    "escrow_contribution": 100.00,
    "advances_applied": 0.00,
    "pending_acknowledgments_count": 1,
    "net_pay": 1337.50,
    "composition_locked_at": null,
    "computed_debt_at_compose": {
      "live_recomputed": true,
      "computed_at": "2026-05-02T20:35:00Z",
      "total_active_debt": 412.50
    },
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi27"
  }
}
```

**Example validation error response (400):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_VALIDATION",
    "message": "Presettlement compose request invalid",
    "details": [
      {"field": "load_uuids", "reason": "all loads must belong to driver_uuid"},
      {"field": "load_uuids", "reason": "all loads must have status='delivered' or 'invoiced'"},
      {"field": "cycle_end_date", "reason": "must be ≥ cycle_start_date"}
    ],
    "request_id": "req_01923ce5"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (422, border routing pending):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_BORDER_ROUTING_PENDING_BLOCKS_COMPOSITION",
    "message": "1 load has has_border_crossing=true with border_routing='pending'. Resolve before composing presettlement.",
    "details": {
      "blocking_loads": [
        {"load_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000load002", "load_number": "L-25002"}
      ]
    },
    "request_id": "req_01923ce5"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (409, driver has open presettlement):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_DRIVER_HAS_OPEN_PRESETTLEMENT",
    "message": "Driver D-0042 already has an open presettlement. Lock or discard before composing a new one.",
    "details": {
      "open_presettlement_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000pset000",
      "open_presettlement_status": "composed"
    },
    "request_id": "req_01923ce5"
  }
}
```

**Example permission error response (403):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PERMISSION_DENIED",
    "message": "Action 'dispatch.presettlement.compose' requires Owner, Administrator, Manager, or Accountant role",
    "details": {"caller_role": "dispatcher"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce5"
  }
}
```

**Error code linkage:** `E_VALIDATION`, `E_BORDER_ROUTING_PENDING_BLOCKS_COMPOSITION` (8a.0.10.1), `E_DRIVER_HAS_OPEN_PRESETTLEMENT` (8a.0.10.1), `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`. On success, emits `dispatch.presettlement_composed` (info) — composition itself is not WF-064 (locking and posting are). The synchronous live debt recompute (per Part 4.5.4.2) is reflected in the response payload's `computed_debt_at_compose` block — this is a transactional decision context per Part 4.5.4 enumeration.

---

#### `POST /api/dispatch/presettlements/{uuid}/unlock`

Unlock a locked presettlement (re-open for composition edits). **Fires WF-064 — high-risk per Part 6.8.2 enumeration item 14 (settlement override / composition manipulation post-lock).**

**Authentication:** Active session cookie.

**Permission:** `dispatch.presettlement.unlock` (Owner only).

**Example request:**
```http
POST /api/dispatch/presettlements/01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000pset001/unlock
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "reason": "Driver disputed escrow contribution amount; reopening composition to verify policy and recalculate per actual escrow target balance"
}
```

**Example success response (200):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "presettlement_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000pset001",
    "previous_status": "locked",
    "new_status": "composed",
    "unlocked_at": "2026-05-02T20:40:00Z",
    "unlocked_by_user_id": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000usr00",
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi28",
    "wf_064_owner_notification": {"fired": true, "notification_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000notif09"}
  }
}
```

**Example validation error response (400):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_VALIDATION",
    "message": "Unlock request invalid",
    "details": [{"field": "reason", "reason": "required; minimum 20 characters"}],
    "request_id": "req_01923ce6"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (422, presettlement already settled):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PRESETTLEMENT_ALREADY_SETTLED",
    "message": "Cannot unlock a presettlement that has been settled. Use Owner reverse-and-replace settlement flow.",
    "details": {"settlement_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000sett001", "settled_at": "2026-05-02T20:38:00Z"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce6"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (422, presettlement not locked):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PRESETTLEMENT_NOT_LOCKED",
    "message": "Presettlement is not locked; nothing to unlock. Status='composed'.",
    "details": {"current_status": "composed"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce6"
  }
}
```

**Example permission error response (403):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PERMISSION_DENIED",
    "message": "Action 'dispatch.presettlement.unlock' requires Owner role",
    "details": {"caller_role": "administrator"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce6"
  }
}
```

**Error code linkage:** `E_VALIDATION`, `E_PRESETTLEMENT_ALREADY_SETTLED` (8a.0.10.1), `E_PRESETTLEMENT_NOT_LOCKED` (8a.0.10.1), `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`. On success, emits `dispatch.presettlement_unlocked` (warning, fires WF-064). On block, emits `dispatch.presettlement_unlock_blocked` (warning, fires WF-064 — success/blocked symmetry).

---

#### `POST /api/dispatch/settlements/post`

Post a settlement (one-way; immutable after posted_at). **Fires WF-064 — high-risk per Part 6.8.2 enumeration item 1 (accounting posting).**

**Authentication:** Active session cookie.

**Permission:** `dispatch.settlement.post` (Owner, Admin, Accountant).

**Example request:**
```http
POST /api/dispatch/settlements/post
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "presettlement_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000pset001",
  "payment_method": "ach",
  "payment_reference": "Net pay for cycle ending 2026-05-02",
  "reason": "Standard weekly settlement for D-0042; presettlement reviewed and approved by manager"
}
```

**Example success response (201):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "settlement_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000sett002",
    "presettlement_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000pset001",
    "driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042",
    "net_pay": 1337.50,
    "payment_method": "ach",
    "posted_at": "2026-05-02T20:45:00Z",
    "posting_period": "2026-05",
    "ach_dispatched": true,
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi29",
    "wf_064_owner_notification": {"fired": true, "notification_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000notif10"},
    "transaction_summary": {
      "settlement_inserted": true,
      "presettlement_status_updated": "settled",
      "loads_status_updated": "settled",
      "journal_entries_posted": true,
      "qbo_outbox_queued": true,
      "ach_outbox_queued": true,
      "all_in_single_transaction": true
    }
  }
}
```

**Example validation error response (400):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_VALIDATION",
    "message": "Settlement post request invalid",
    "details": [
      {"field": "payment_method", "reason": "must be one of: check, ach, advance_application"},
      {"field": "reason", "reason": "required; minimum 20 characters"}
    ],
    "request_id": "req_01923ce7"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (422, presettlement not locked):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PRESETTLEMENT_NOT_LOCKED",
    "message": "Cannot post settlement on an unlocked presettlement. Lock the composition first.",
    "details": {"presettlement_status": "composed"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce7"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (422, period closed):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_ACCOUNTING_PERIOD_CLOSED",
    "message": "Cannot post settlement to closed accounting period 2026-04. Reopen period or post to current period.",
    "details": {"requested_period": "2026-04", "period_status": "closed"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce7"
  }
}
```

**Example permission error response (403):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PERMISSION_DENIED",
    "message": "Action 'dispatch.settlement.post' requires Owner, Administrator, or Accountant role",
    "details": {"caller_role": "manager"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce7"
  }
}
```

**Error code linkage:** `E_VALIDATION`, `E_PRESETTLEMENT_NOT_LOCKED` (8a.0.10.1), `E_ACCOUNTING_PERIOD_CLOSED` (will be in Part 10 Accounting), `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`. On success, emits `dispatch.settlement_posted` (warning, fires WF-064) + `accounting.journal_entries_posted` (info, owned by accounting). On block, emits `dispatch.settlement_post_blocked` (warning, fires WF-064 — success/blocked symmetry).

---

#### `POST /api/pwa/loads/{uuid}/respond`

PWA endpoint for driver to accept or decline a load offer. Per WF-051 supports offline acceptance with replayed timestamp.

**Authentication:** PWA session cookie.

**Permission:** `dispatch.load.respond` (assigned driver only).

**Example request (accept, online):**
```http
POST /api/pwa/loads/01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000load003/respond
Authorization: Bearer {pwa_jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "response": "accepted",
  "responded_at_device": "2026-05-02T20:50:00Z"
}
```

**Example request (accept, replayed from offline):**
```http
POST /api/pwa/loads/01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000load003/respond
Authorization: Bearer {pwa_jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "response": "accepted",
  "responded_at_device": "2026-05-02T19:30:00Z",
  "offline_response_at": "2026-05-02T19:30:00Z",
  "synced_at": "2026-05-02T20:50:00Z",
  "client_request_id": "pwa_req_offline_xyz_abc"
}
```

**Example success response (200):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "load_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000load003",
    "response": "accepted",
    "responded_at_server": "2026-05-02T20:50:00Z",
    "offline_response_at": "2026-05-02T19:30:00Z",
    "load_status": "scheduled",
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi30"
  }
}
```

**Example validation error response (400):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_VALIDATION",
    "message": "Load response request invalid",
    "details": [
      {"field": "response", "reason": "must be one of: accepted, declined"},
      {"field": "responded_at_device", "reason": "must be ISO 8601 datetime; required"}
    ],
    "request_id": "req_01923ce8"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (409, already responded):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_LOAD_ALREADY_RESPONDED",
    "message": "Driver already responded to this load offer",
    "details": {
      "previous_response": "accepted",
      "previous_responded_at_server": "2026-05-02T19:35:00Z",
      "client_request_id_match": true
    },
    "request_id": "req_01923ce8"
  }
}
```

Note: when `client_request_id_match: true`, the request is treated as idempotent — same client_request_id → same response returned (200, not 409). The 409 above shows when a DIFFERENT request_id attempts to re-respond.

**Example permission error response (403):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PERMISSION_DENIED",
    "message": "Driver D-0039 cannot respond to a load assigned to D-0042",
    "details": {"caller_driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d039", "load_assigned_driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce8"
  }
}
```

**Error code linkage:** `E_VALIDATION`, `E_LOAD_ALREADY_RESPONDED` (8a.0.10.1), `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`. On success, emits `dispatch.load_response_recorded` (info). The `offline_response_at` field is preserved in the audit event for chain-of-custody — KPIs compute on `offline_response_at` when present (driver response time), not `responded_at_server` (which is sync time).

---

#### `POST /api/dispatch/intransit-issues`

Create an in-transit issue from PWA per WF-048.

**Authentication:** PWA session cookie OR office session cookie.

**Permission:** `dispatch.intransit_issue.create` (assigned driver via PWA; any office role for proxy entry).

**Example request:**
```http
POST /api/dispatch/intransit-issues
Authorization: Bearer {pwa_jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "load_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000load003",
  "category": "mechanical",
  "severity": "warning",
  "description": "Engine warning light came on at mile marker 287 on I-35 northbound",
  "lat": 28.5234,
  "lng": -97.1234,
  "captured_at_device": "2026-05-02T20:55:00Z",
  "evidence_uuids": ["01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000evid005"]
}
```

**Example success response (201):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "intransit_issue_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000isi0001",
    "load_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000load003",
    "driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042",
    "unit_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000t032",
    "category": "mechanical",
    "severity": "warning",
    "auto_attached_telematics": {
      "samsara_unit_data_at_capture": {
        "speed_mph": 62,
        "engine_rpm": 1850,
        "odometer": 187234,
        "fuel_pct": 0.58
      }
    },
    "captured_at_device": "2026-05-02T20:55:00Z",
    "captured_at_server": "2026-05-02T20:55:30Z",
    "queued_for_triage": true,
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi31"
  }
}
```

**Example validation error response (400):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_VALIDATION",
    "message": "In-transit issue request invalid",
    "details": [
      {"field": "category", "reason": "must be one of: mechanical, safety, customer, route, other"},
      {"field": "description", "reason": "required; minimum 10 characters"}
    ],
    "request_id": "req_01923ce9"
  }
}
```

**Example business error:** Not applicable — issue creation has no business-rule rejections (any in-transit issue is valid; triage decides disposition).

**Example permission error response (403):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PERMISSION_DENIED",
    "message": "Driver can only create in-transit issues for loads assigned to them",
    "details": {"caller_driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d039", "load_assigned_driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce9"
  }
}
```

**Error code linkage:** `E_VALIDATION`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`. On success, emits `dispatch.intransit_issue_created` (info for severity=info, warning for severity=warning, critical for severity=critical). Critical-severity issues additionally trigger SMS to Owner+Manager+Safety per Part 5.5.4.2 exception list (operationally time-sensitive in-flight events).

---

#### `POST /api/dispatch/intransit-issues/{uuid}/convert-to-wo`

Convert an in-transit issue to a maintenance work order per WF-049.

**Authentication:** Active session cookie.

**Permission:** `dispatch.intransit_issue.convert` (Owner, Admin, Manager, Dispatcher, Mechanic).

**Example request:**
```http
POST /api/dispatch/intransit-issues/01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000isi0001/convert-to-wo
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "wo_type": "repair",
  "estimated_arrival_at_shop": "2026-05-03T10:00:00Z",
  "wo_assignee_mechanic_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000m007",
  "notes": "Scheduling repair for engine warning light at next shop stop; driver advised to monitor and reduce speed if symptoms worsen"
}
```

**Example success response (201):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "intransit_issue_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000isi0001",
    "issue_status": "converted_to_wo",
    "wo_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000wo0050",
    "wo_number": "WO-25050",
    "wo_type": "repair",
    "wo_status": "scheduled",
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi32",
    "transaction_summary": {
      "issue_status_updated": true,
      "wo_inserted": true,
      "evidence_relinked_to_wo": true,
      "all_in_single_transaction": true
    }
  }
}
```

**Example validation error response (400):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_VALIDATION",
    "message": "Convert-to-WO request invalid",
    "details": [
      {"field": "wo_type", "reason": "must be one of: pm, repair, tire, accident"},
      {"field": "wo_assignee_mechanic_uuid", "reason": "must reference a user with role='mechanic'"}
    ],
    "request_id": "req_01923cea"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (409, already converted):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_INTRANSIT_ISSUE_ALREADY_CONVERTED",
    "message": "In-transit issue already converted to WO-25048 on 2026-05-02T20:00:00Z",
    "details": {"existing_wo_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000wo0048"},
    "request_id": "req_01923cea"
  }
}
```

**Example permission error response (403):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PERMISSION_DENIED",
    "message": "Action 'dispatch.intransit_issue.convert' requires Owner, Administrator, Manager, Dispatcher, or Mechanic role",
    "details": {"caller_role": "driver"},
    "request_id": "req_01923cea"
  }
}
```

**Error code linkage:** `E_VALIDATION`, `E_INTRANSIT_ISSUE_ALREADY_CONVERTED` (8a.0.10.1), `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`. On success, emits `dispatch.intransit_issue_converted_to_wo` (info) + cross-module `maintenance.work_order_created` (info, owned by maintenance via cross-module service call) atomically.

#### 8a.0.4.1 Contract Profile Mapping (DoD closure for permissions not given full endpoint specs)

Per the Contract Profile pattern from Part 7.3.4.1, the dispatch module has more permission actions in §8a.0.7 than the 9 high-risk endpoints fully specced above. Standard CRUD on supporting entities (load read/list, stop read/list, presettlement read/list, intransit_issue read/list, settlement read/list, geofence-timeline read, etc.) is covered by the same three reusable Contract Profiles (A read-only, B CRUD non-WF-064, C WF-064 mutation) defined in Part 7.3.4.1.

The Contract Profile DEFINITIONS are not redefined here; they are referenced from §7.3.4.1. This subsection provides per-permission Contract Profile assignment for Dispatch.

| Permission action | Contract artifact | Endpoint(s) | Profile-specific error set | Test IDs |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `dispatch.load.list` | Profile A | `GET /api/dispatch/loads` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` | T-141.1 (filtering), T-141.2 (RLS scope) |
| `dispatch.load.read` | Profile A | `GET /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid}` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`, `E_NOT_FOUND` | T-141.3 |
| `dispatch.load.create` | FULL | `POST /api/dispatch/loads` (§8a.0.4) | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_DRIVER_HOS_VIOLATION`, `E_DRIVER_INACTIVE`, `E_UNIT_RETIRED`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` | T-141.4..T-141.10 |
| `dispatch.load.update` | Profile B | `PATCH /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid}` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_VERSION_CONFLICT`, `E_LOAD_ALREADY_SETTLED`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` | T-141.11 |
| `dispatch.load.set_border_routing` | FULL (charge_to_customer/pay_to_driver/pending paths) + FULL (deduct_from_driver path is WF-064) | `POST /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/border-routing` (§8a.0.4) | per FULL spec | T-141.12..T-141.18 |
| `dispatch.load.close` | FULL | `POST /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/close` (§8a.0.4) | per FULL spec | T-142.1..T-142.6 |
| `dispatch.load.cancel` ⚡ WF-064 | FULL | `POST /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/cancel` (§8a.0.4) | per FULL spec | T-142.7..T-142.11 |
| `dispatch.load_stop.list` | Profile A | `GET /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/stops` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` | T-143.1 |
| `dispatch.load_stop.transition` | FULL | `POST /api/dispatch/load-stops/{uuid}/state-transition` (§8a.0.4) | per FULL spec | T-143.2..T-143.10 |
| `dispatch.load_stop.transition.geofence` | FULL (same endpoint, source=geofence; webhook auth) | `POST /api/dispatch/load-stops/{uuid}/state-transition` (§8a.0.4) | per FULL spec + Samsara webhook signature validation per Part 5.2.4 | T-143.11..T-143.14 |
| `dispatch.load_stop.transition.pwa` | FULL (same endpoint, source=driver_pwa; PWA auth) | `POST /api/dispatch/load-stops/{uuid}/state-transition` (§8a.0.4) | per FULL spec | T-143.15..T-143.16 |
| `dispatch.load_stop.add_extra` | Profile B | `POST /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/stops` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_LOAD_ALREADY_SETTLED`, `E_STOP_SEQUENCE_OVERLAP`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` | T-143.17 (multi-stop per WF-053) |
| `dispatch.load_leg.list` | Profile A | `GET /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/legs` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` | T-144.1 (IFTA per Part 3.14.4.4) |
| `dispatch.load_leg.recompute_mileage` ⚡ WF-064 | Profile C | `POST /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/legs/recompute` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_LOAD_NOT_DELIVERED`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` | T-144.2 (IFTA correction is high-risk) |
| `dispatch.presettlement.list` | Profile A | `GET /api/dispatch/presettlements` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` | T-145.1 |
| `dispatch.presettlement.read` | Profile A | `GET /api/dispatch/presettlements/{uuid}` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`, `E_NOT_FOUND` | T-145.2 |
| `dispatch.presettlement.compose` | FULL | `POST /api/dispatch/presettlements/compose` (§8a.0.4) | per FULL spec | T-145.3..T-145.10 |
| `dispatch.presettlement.lock` | Profile B | `POST /api/dispatch/presettlements/{uuid}/lock` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_PRESETTLEMENT_ALREADY_LOCKED`, `E_PRESETTLEMENT_ALREADY_SETTLED`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` | T-145.11 |
| `dispatch.presettlement.unlock` ⚡ WF-064 | FULL | `POST /api/dispatch/presettlements/{uuid}/unlock` (§8a.0.4) | per FULL spec | T-145.12..T-145.16 |
| `dispatch.presettlement.discard` ⚡ WF-064 | Profile C | `POST /api/dispatch/presettlements/{uuid}/discard` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_PRESETTLEMENT_ALREADY_SETTLED`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` | T-145.17 |
| `dispatch.presettlement.deduction_hold` | Profile B (per WF-012 dispatch-side; full enforcement in driver_finance Part 8b) | `POST /api/dispatch/presettlements/{uuid}/deduction-holds` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_PRESETTLEMENT_ALREADY_LOCKED`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` | T-145.18 |
| `dispatch.settlement.list` | Profile A | `GET /api/dispatch/settlements` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` | T-146.1 |
| `dispatch.settlement.read` | Profile A | `GET /api/dispatch/settlements/{uuid}` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`, `E_NOT_FOUND` | T-146.2 |
| `dispatch.settlement.post` ⚡ WF-064 | FULL | `POST /api/dispatch/settlements/post` (§8a.0.4) | per FULL spec | T-146.3..T-146.9 |
| `dispatch.settlement.reverse` ⚡ WF-064 | Profile C | `POST /api/dispatch/settlements/{uuid}/reverse` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_SETTLEMENT_NOT_REVERSIBLE_FOR_PERIOD`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` | T-146.10 (Owner-only; reverse-and-replace pattern per 8a.0.1) |
| `dispatch.intransit_issue.list` | Profile A | `GET /api/dispatch/intransit-issues` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` | T-147.1 |
| `dispatch.intransit_issue.read` | Profile A | `GET /api/dispatch/intransit-issues/{uuid}` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`, `E_NOT_FOUND` | T-147.2 |
| `dispatch.intransit_issue.create` | FULL | `POST /api/dispatch/intransit-issues` (§8a.0.4) | per FULL spec | T-147.3..T-147.6 |
| `dispatch.intransit_issue.convert` | FULL | `POST /api/dispatch/intransit-issues/{uuid}/convert-to-wo` (§8a.0.4) | per FULL spec | T-147.7..T-147.10 |
| `dispatch.intransit_issue.resolve_without_wo` | Profile B | `POST /api/dispatch/intransit-issues/{uuid}/resolve` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_INTRANSIT_ISSUE_ALREADY_RESOLVED`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` | T-147.11 |
| `dispatch.cycle.read` (NB/SB analytics per WF-052) | Profile A | `GET /api/dispatch/cycles?driver_uuid={uuid}` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` | T-148.1 |
| `dispatch.geofence_timeline.read` (per WF-043) | Profile A | `GET /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/geofence-timeline` | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` | T-148.2 (chronological event log read) |
| `dispatch.load.respond` (PWA only) | FULL | `POST /api/pwa/loads/{uuid}/respond` (§8a.0.4) | per FULL spec | T-149.1..T-149.5 |
| `dispatch.load.recompute_pay` ⚡ WF-064 | Profile C | `POST /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/recompute-pay` (per WF-013) | `E_VALIDATION`, `E_LOAD_ALREADY_SETTLED`, `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` | T-149.6 (WF-013 driver pay recompute on settled load is high-risk) |

**Coverage summary:**
- 9 actions have FULL endpoint contracts in §8a.0.4 (the highest-risk and most novel workflows)
- 25 additional permission actions are mapped via Contract Profiles A/B/C above
- **34 of 34 permission actions in §8a.0.7 now have an explicit API mapping artifact.** No permission action is left without DoD closure.

**One additional error code referenced above is added to §8a.0.10.1 below:** `E_SETTLEMENT_NOT_REVERSIBLE_FOR_PERIOD`. The other newly-mentioned codes (`E_DRIVER_INACTIVE`, `E_UNIT_RETIRED`, `E_INTRANSIT_ISSUE_ALREADY_RESOLVED`, `E_PRESETTLEMENT_ALREADY_LOCKED`, `E_LOAD_NOT_DELIVERED`, `E_STOP_SEQUENCE_OVERLAP`) are defined in §8a.0.10.1 below. `E_NOT_FOUND` is a baseline error code defined in Part 3.

### 8a.0.5 Element 5: Validation rules

**MUST 8a.0.5.1 — Dispatch atomicity (per Part 4.4.2.2):** if `assigned_unit_uuid IS NOT NULL` then `assigned_driver_uuid` MUST also be NOT NULL. Enforced at API layer (`E_VALIDATION` on create) AND DB CHECK constraint (defense-in-depth).

**MUST 8a.0.5.2 — Stop single-in-flight invariant (per Part 4.4.2.3):** at any time, exactly one stop per load may have `state IN ('en_route','arrived','checked_in','loading','loaded','unloading','unloaded')`. Attempt to transition a stop into one of these states while another stop is in-flight returns `E_STOP_SEQUENCE_VIOLATION`. Enforced at API layer with cross-row validation; complementary partial unique index at DB level (per Part 4 schema).

**MUST 8a.0.5.3 — Stop state machine forward-only (per Part 3.16.1 + 4.4.2.4):** the canonical state DAG is `scheduled → en_route → arrived → checked_in → loading → loaded → unloading → unloaded → departed` (with `skipped` as a terminal alternative for any non-arrived state). Backward transitions are FORBIDDEN except via `source='correction'` which creates a NEW append-only event (does not modify prior). Returns `E_STOP_STATE_TRANSITION_INVALID`.

**MUST 8a.0.5.4 — Border routing decision required before settlement (per Part 4.4.2.5 + WF-014):** loads with `has_border_crossing=true` MUST have `border_routing != 'pending'` before participating in `presettlement.compose()`. Returns `E_BORDER_ROUTING_PENDING_BLOCKS_COMPOSITION`.

**MUST 8a.0.5.5 — Border routing immutability after settlement (per 8a.0.4 close + cancel endpoints):** `border_routing` cannot be modified once load `status IN ('settled','invoiced')`. Returns `E_LOAD_ALREADY_SETTLED`. Owner correction requires reverse-and-replace settlement flow.

**MUST 8a.0.5.6 — Driver HOS check on assignment:** when assigning a driver to a load (at create OR via assignment endpoint), system MUST query `safety.driver_hos_status` (canonical reference read). If driver currently has a violation, returns `E_DRIVER_HOS_VIOLATION`. Approaching-limit warnings are advisory (returned in response payload but do not block).

**MUST 8a.0.5.7 — Maintenance-due check on assignment (per WF-044):** when assigning a unit to a load (at create OR via assignment endpoint), system MUST query `maintenance.work_orders` for open PM-due WOs. Findings returned in response payload as `wf_044_maintenance_warnings` array. Does NOT block creation; UI surfaces warning per 8a.0.2.3.7.

**MUST 8a.0.5.8 — Driver active status check on assignment:** drivers with `status IN ('separated','blocked','on_leave')` cannot be assigned. Returns `E_DRIVER_INACTIVE`.

**MUST 8a.0.5.9 — Unit active status check on assignment:** units with `status IN ('retired','sold')` cannot be assigned. Returns `E_UNIT_RETIRED`.

**MUST 8a.0.5.10 — Multi-stop pricing math (per WF-053):** total_revenue MUST equal base_revenue + sum(load_stops.extra_rate). API-layer assertion AND DB CHECK constraint.

**MUST 8a.0.5.11 — Driver pay catalog version pin per cycle:** when `presettlement.compose()` runs, the `driver_pay_catalog_uuid` referenced on each load is locked at compose time. Subsequent catalog edits do NOT recompose the presettlement. Recomputation requires `dispatch.load.recompute_pay` action (WF-064 ⚡; Owner-only).

**MUST 8a.0.5.12 — One open presettlement per driver:** a driver can have at most ONE presettlement with `status IN ('composed','locked')` at a time. Attempt to compose a second returns `E_DRIVER_HAS_OPEN_PRESETTLEMENT`. The first must be settled or discarded first.

**MUST 8a.0.5.13 — Live-recompute debt at presettlement compose (per Part 4.5.4.2 transactional debt authority):** `presettlement.compose()` MUST synchronously call `driver_finance.recompute_driver_debt(driver_uuid)` BEFORE finalizing the composition. The cached `master_data.drivers.total_active_debt` is NOT used here — this is a transactional decision context per Part 4.5.4 enumeration.

**MUST 8a.0.5.14 — Settlement post invariants:** presettlement MUST be `status='locked'`. Posting period MUST be open (per Part 10 accounting period management — TBD). Driver MUST have `status != 'blocked'`. ACH payment method requires non-NULL `vendors.bank_account_last4` for the driver-vendor.

**MUST 8a.0.5.15 — Settlement post immutability:** after `posted_at` set, the settlement record is immutable. Corrections require reverse-and-replace (`dispatch.settlement.reverse` action; Owner-only WF-064).

**MUST 8a.0.5.16 — Append-only stop event log:** `dispatch.load_stop_events` rows are INSERT-only. UPDATE and DELETE blocked by RLS at DB level (per Part 4.4.3 + audit pattern).

**MUST 8a.0.5.17 — Geofence event correlation JSON shape:** when `transitioned_by_source='geofence'` and PWA also reported the same transition within ±60 seconds, the `geofence_correlation_json` MUST contain BOTH events with timestamps and source IDs for triage. Per WF-043 ground-truth.

**MUST 8a.0.5.18 — In-transit issue PWA payload:** PWA-originated `intransit_issue.create` MUST include `lat`/`lng` (geolocation), `captured_at_device` (PWA local time), and at least 1 evidence_uuid OR a non-empty description (≥10 chars). Per WF-048.

**MUST 8a.0.5.19 — Idempotency for PWA load response:** PWA endpoints accepting `client_request_id` in the payload MUST treat duplicate request_ids from the same driver+load as idempotent — return the prior response (200), not a 409. Defends against replayed retries during flaky connectivity per WF-051.

**MUST 8a.0.5.20 — IFTA mileage attribution (per Part 3.14.4.4):** when load is delivered, `dispatch.load_legs` MUST be populated with per-state mileage breakdowns. Initial population is automatic from Samsara telemetry (per Part 5.2 integration); manual recompute is a WF-064 action (`dispatch.load_leg.recompute_mileage`) Owner-only.

### 8a.0.6 Element 6: Accounting effects

**Load created (WF-039 auto driver-bill):** if assigned_driver AND assigned_unit are set at create, fires `accounting.create_driver_bill_from_load()` cross-module service function. This INSERTs a `accounting.bills` row (a "driver bill" is an AP bill from the driver-vendor for the load's pay), queues the bill for QBO sync via outbox, and links the bill via `loads.driver_bill_uuid`. Posting template: `driver_load_bill_create_v1` (defined in catalogs.posting_templates per Part 7.3 + Part 3.18.5).

**Load closed with factoring packet (WF-040):** fires `accounting.create_invoice_from_load()` cross-module service function. This INSERTs `accounting.invoices`, queues for QBO sync, and assembles the factoring packet bundle (BOL + POD + accessorials → single PDF or document set per documents module Part 9). Posting template: `customer_invoice_create_from_load_v1`.

**Border routing 'charge_to_customer':** adds an invoice line to the load's `accounting.invoices` row (created on load close). If the invoice is already created (load closed before routing decision — rare), the invoice gets the line via amendment per accounting module (Part 10). Posting template: `border_crossing_charge_v1`.

**Border routing 'deduct_from_driver' (WF-064 path):** fires cross-module `driver_finance.create_liability_from_border_routing()`. The liability appears on the driver's account; deduction schedule applies it across future cycles. Posting template: `driver_liability_border_v1`.

**Border routing 'pay_to_driver':** adds a line to the driver's bill (the auto-created bill from WF-039) via cross-module `accounting.add_line_to_bill()`. Posting template: `border_crossing_pay_v1`.

**Settlement posted (WF-064 path):** the most accounting-intensive operation. Posts journal entries for: gross pay debit (driver-bill payment), deduction credits (each deduction applied), escrow contribution credit (escrow_ledger), advance closure credits (driver_advances). All in a single transaction per Part 4.6 atomicity. Posting templates (multiple): `settlement_post_gross_pay_v1`, `settlement_post_deduction_apply_v1`, `settlement_post_escrow_contribution_v1`, `settlement_post_advance_closure_v1`. Cross-module service: `accounting.post_settlement()`.

**Load cancelled (WF-064 path):** if `reverse_driver_bill=true`, fires cross-module `accounting.reverse_bill()` which creates an offsetting credit memo on the driver-bill. Posting template: `driver_load_bill_reverse_v1`.

**Settlement reversed (WF-064 path; Owner only):** fires `accounting.reverse_settlement()` which creates offsetting journal entries reversing the original settlement post. The original settlement record retains `posted_at` (immutable); a NEW settlement record with `is_reversal_of_uuid` populated is created. Posting templates (multiple): mirror images of the post templates above.

**Load_legs recomputation (WF-064 path; Owner only):** does NOT directly emit accounting effects, but updates IFTA report data which downstream affects fuel-tax accruals (per Part 3.14 IFTA module — TBD; expected in Part 9 Fuel module). Audit-only at dispatch layer.

### 8a.0.7 Element 7: Permissions

**Role matrix for Dispatch actions:**

| Action | Owner | Admin | Manager | Accountant | Dispatcher | Safety | Driver | Mechanic |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `dispatch.load.list` | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | self assigned | — |
| `dispatch.load.read` | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | self assigned | — |
| `dispatch.load.create` | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | — | — | — |
| `dispatch.load.update` | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | — | — | — |
| `dispatch.load.set_border_routing` (charge_to_customer/pay_to_driver/pending) | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | — | — | — |
| `dispatch.load.set_border_routing.deduct` ⚡ WF-064 | ✓ | ✓ | — | — | — | — | — | — |
| `dispatch.load.close` | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | — | ✓ | — | — | — |
