¹ Office roles can create proxy issues on behalf of drivers (e.g. driver radioed in but PWA failed); requires `proxy_for_driver_uuid` in payload + reason.

**WF-064 actions involving this module (8 originated here + 4 inherited from cross-module flows = 12 total participation paths):**

The Dispatch module ORIGINATES eight WF-064 actions where the high-risk decision and audit event source from a dispatch API call. Four additional WF-064 actions INHERIT through dispatch because a dispatch API call invokes a cross-module service function that itself originates a WF-064 audit. The two categories are mapped explicitly below per the same pattern as Part 7.2.7.

**A. Originated in Dispatch (8 actions):**

| # | Action | Originating Module | Why Dispatch participates | API endpoint | Audit event(s) (success / blocked) | Test IDs |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | `dispatch.load.set_border_routing.deduct` | dispatch | Originates here — the routing decision sets `border_routing='deduct_from_driver'` per WF-014; downstream INHERITS to `driver_finance.liability_created` (see row B-1) | `POST /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/border-routing` | `dispatch.border_routing_set_deduct_executed` / `dispatch.border_routing_set_deduct_blocked` | T-141.13, T-141.14, T-141.15, T-141.18 |
| 2 | `dispatch.load.cancel` | dispatch | Originates here — load status transition to 'cancelled'; affects driver-bill (reverse) and any in-flight liabilities | `POST /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/cancel` | `dispatch.load_cancelled` / `dispatch.load_cancellation_blocked` | T-142.7..T-142.11 |
| 3 | `dispatch.load.recompute_pay` | dispatch | Originates here — recomputing driver pay on a settled load forces a settlement reverse/replace cascade | `POST /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/recompute-pay` | `dispatch.load_pay_recomputed` / `dispatch.load_pay_recompute_blocked` | T-149.6 |
| 4 | `dispatch.load_leg.recompute_mileage` | dispatch | Originates here — IFTA mileage correction affects fuel-tax accruals downstream | `POST /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/legs/recompute` | `dispatch.load_legs_recomputed` / `dispatch.load_legs_recompute_blocked` | T-144.2 |
| 5 | `dispatch.presettlement.unlock` | dispatch | Originates here — re-opens locked composition; per Part 6.8.2 enumeration item 14 (settlement composition manipulation post-lock) | `POST /api/dispatch/presettlements/{uuid}/unlock` | `dispatch.presettlement_unlocked` / `dispatch.presettlement_unlock_blocked` | T-145.12..T-145.16 |
| 6 | `dispatch.presettlement.discard` | dispatch | Originates here — discarding presettlement releases loads back to pool; data integrity sensitive | `POST /api/dispatch/presettlements/{uuid}/discard` | `dispatch.presettlement_discarded` / `dispatch.presettlement_discard_blocked` | T-145.17 |
| 7 | `dispatch.settlement.post` | dispatch | Originates here — the actual settlement posting per Part 6.8.2 enumeration item 1 (accounting posting); downstream INHERITS to multiple posting events (see row B-2) | `POST /api/dispatch/settlements/post` | `dispatch.settlement_posted` / `dispatch.settlement_post_blocked` | T-146.3..T-146.9 |
| 8 | `dispatch.settlement.reverse` | dispatch | Originates here — reverse-and-replace settlement; downstream cascade to all journal entries | `POST /api/dispatch/settlements/{uuid}/reverse` | `dispatch.settlement_reversed` / `dispatch.settlement_reversal_blocked` | T-146.10 |

**B. Inherited through Dispatch (4 actions originated in OTHER modules but reachable via dispatch flows):**

These actions are NOT originated by dispatch API endpoints — they originate in their owning module per Part 6.8.2 enumeration. They appear here only because a dispatch API call may trigger them as a downstream side effect (via cross-module service function invocation).

| # | Action | Originating Module | How Dispatch triggers it | Originating module API | Originating audit event(s) | Test IDs (originating module) |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | `driver_finance.driver_liability.create` (Part 6.8.2 item 7 — liability creation that affects deduction schedules) | driver_finance | When `dispatch.load.set_border_routing.deduct` fires, the routing service function downstream calls `driver_finance.create_liability_from_border_routing()` per WF-014 | `POST /api/driver-finance/liabilities` (defined in Part 8b) | `driver_finance.liability_created` / `driver_finance.liability_create_blocked` | (defined in Part 8b Driver Finance — TBD; tracked by T-150.x range) |
| 2 | `accounting.journal_entries.posted` (Part 6.8.2 item 1 — accounting posting; the multi-line settlement post) | accounting | When `dispatch.settlement.post` fires, the post service function downstream calls `accounting.post_settlement()` which writes 4-7 journal entries per the posting templates | `POST /api/accounting/post-batch` (defined in Part 10) | `accounting.journal_entries_posted` / `accounting.posting_blocked` | (defined in Part 10 Accounting — TBD; tracked by T-160.x range) |
| 3 | `accounting.bill.reverse` (Part 6.8.2 item 7 — accounting reversal) | accounting | When `dispatch.load.cancel` fires with `reverse_driver_bill=true`, the cancel service function downstream calls `accounting.reverse_bill()` to credit-memo the driver-bill | `POST /api/accounting/bills/{uuid}/reverse` (defined in Part 10) | `accounting.bill_reversed` / `accounting.bill_reverse_blocked` | (defined in Part 10 Accounting — TBD; T-160.x range) |
| 4 | `accounting.invoice.amend` (Part 6.8.2 item 7 — invoice amendment) | accounting | When `dispatch.load.set_border_routing` fires with 'charge_to_customer' on a closed load (rare), the routing service function downstream calls `accounting.amend_invoice()` to add the line | `POST /api/accounting/invoices/{uuid}/amend` (defined in Part 10) | `accounting.invoice_amended` / `accounting.invoice_amend_blocked` | (defined in Part 10 Accounting — TBD; T-160.x range) |

**Net result of the explicit mapping:**
- **8 WF-064 actions ORIGINATED by dispatch API endpoints.** These have full success/blocked event pairs in §8a.0.9, dedicated parity tests in §8a.0.10, and ⚡ markers in §8a.0.7 permission matrix.
- **4 WF-064 actions INHERITED through dispatch downstream service calls.** These are tracked by their originating module's tests (Part 8b Driver Finance + Part 10 Accounting); dispatch carries no separate test coverage for them.

**Total: dispatch participates in 12 WF-064 paths — 8 originated + 4 inherited.**

**MUST 8a.0.7.1 — Driver self-assigned scope (per Part 4.4.3.1):** drivers SELECT only their own assigned loads, stops, geofence events, presettlements they own, and intransit_issues they created or are assigned to via load assignment.

**MUST 8a.0.7.2 — Mechanic equipment-only access:** mechanics can READ load_stops via the work_orders linkage (for damage-photo correlation per WF-058), and can convert intransit_issues to work orders, but cannot create/update loads or post settlements.

**MUST 8a.0.7.3 — Safety read-access for HOS dashboards:** safety role can SELECT loads, stops, and intransit_issues with severity='safety' or category='safety' for HOS active-driver filtering per WF-038. Cannot create/update dispatch entities.

### 8a.0.8 Element 8: Notifications

| Audit event | Channel | Recipient | Severity |
|---|---|---|---|
| `dispatch.load_created` | none | n/a | info — sampled, no notification |
| `dispatch.load_updated` | none | n/a | info — sampled |
| `dispatch.load_assigned` | email | the assigned driver (with PWA push notification mirror) | info |
| `dispatch.load_response_recorded` | email | Manager + Dispatcher | info |
| `dispatch.load_response_recorded` (declined) | email + SMS | Manager + Dispatcher (operationally urgent — need replacement) | warning |
| `dispatch.assignment_with_maintenance_warning` | email | Manager (operational alert) | warning |
| `dispatch.border_routing_set` (non-deduct) | email | Accountant + Manager | info |
| `dispatch.border_routing_set_deduct_executed` | email | Owner + Accountant + the driver | warning + WF-064 |
| `dispatch.load_closed` | email | Accountant + Manager | info |
| `dispatch.load_cancelled` | email | Owner + Accountant + Manager + the driver | warning + WF-064 |
| `dispatch.stop_state_corrected` | email | Manager + Dispatcher | warning |
| `dispatch.stop_arrived_late` (computed; >2h late) | email + SMS | Manager + Dispatcher | warning + SMS allowed (Part 5.5.4.2 exception) |
| `dispatch.stop_detention_threshold_exceeded` | email | Accountant + Manager | warning |
| `dispatch.presettlement_composed` | email | Accountant + Manager | info |
| `dispatch.presettlement_locked` | email | Accountant + Owner | info |
| `dispatch.presettlement_unlocked` | email | Owner + Accountant + Manager | warning + WF-064 |
| `dispatch.presettlement_discarded` | email | Owner + Accountant | warning + WF-064 |
| `dispatch.settlement_posted` | email | Owner + Accountant + the driver (settlement summary) | warning + WF-064 |
| `dispatch.settlement_reversed` | email | Owner + Accountant + the driver | warning + WF-064 |
| `dispatch.intransit_issue_created` (info) | email | Manager + Dispatcher | info |
| `dispatch.intransit_issue_created` (warning) | email + push to PWA | Manager + Dispatcher + Safety | warning |
| `dispatch.intransit_issue_created` (critical) | email + SMS + push | Owner + Manager + Dispatcher + Safety | critical + SMS (Part 5.5.4.2 exception — in-flight emergency) |
| `dispatch.intransit_issue_converted_to_wo` | email | the assigned mechanic + Manager | info |
| `dispatch.factoring_packet_assembled` | email | Accountant | info (sampled) |
| `dispatch.load_pay_recomputed` | email | Owner + Accountant | warning + WF-064 |
| `dispatch.load_legs_recomputed` | email | Owner + Accountant | warning + WF-064 |

**MUST 8a.0.8.1** — Per Part 5.5.4.2 critical-only-SMS rule: dispatch SMS notifications are limited to (a) load decline (operational urgency for replacement), (b) stop arrived late >2h (customer impact), and (c) critical-severity in-transit issues (in-flight emergency). All other dispatch notifications are email-only.

**MUST 8a.0.8.2** — `dispatch.settlement_posted` notification to the driver MUST include settlement summary (gross pay, deductions, escrow, net pay) but MUST NOT include sensitive info like other drivers' info or aggregate company financials. Per privacy + Part 5.6 templates.

**MUST 8a.0.8.3** — `dispatch.intransit_issue_created` SMS for critical severity goes to the user's mobile phone from `identity.users.phone`. If user has opted out of SMS for non-CDL events (per Part 5.6.3.4), the critical issue alert IS still sent (this is an operational emergency exception).

### 8a.0.9 Element 9: Audit events

| Event class | Severity | Subject | Fires WF-064? | Symmetric pair |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `dispatch.load_created` | info | the load + linked driver_bill if WF-039 fired | no | none |
| `dispatch.load_updated` | info | the load | no | none |
| `dispatch.load_assigned` | info | the load + driver | no | none |
| `dispatch.assignment_with_maintenance_warning` | warning | the load + unit + open_wo | no | none (operational warning not WF-064) |
| `dispatch.load_response_recorded` | info | the load + driver | no | none |
| `dispatch.border_routing_set` (non-deduct) | info | the load | no | none |
| `dispatch.border_routing_set_deduct_executed` | warning | the load + linked liability | yes | `dispatch.border_routing_set_deduct_blocked` |
| `dispatch.border_routing_set_deduct_blocked` | warning | the load | yes | success: `dispatch.border_routing_set_deduct_executed` |
| `dispatch.load_closed` | info | the load + linked invoice | no | none |
| `dispatch.factoring_packet_assembled` | info (sampled) | the load + factoring_packet | no | none |
| `dispatch.load_cancelled` | warning | the load + reversed driver_bill | yes | `dispatch.load_cancellation_blocked` |
| `dispatch.load_cancellation_blocked` | warning | the load | yes | success: `dispatch.load_cancelled` |
| `dispatch.load_pay_recomputed` | warning | the load | yes | `dispatch.load_pay_recompute_blocked` |
| `dispatch.load_pay_recompute_blocked` | warning | the load | yes | success: `dispatch.load_pay_recomputed` |
| `dispatch.stop_transitioned` | info (sampled 10%; always for source=correction) | the stop | no | none |
| `dispatch.stop_state_corrected` | warning | the stop + correction reason | no | none (corrections are info-only audit; don't fire WF-064 unless they trigger downstream settlement reverse) |
| `dispatch.stop_sequence_violation_attempted` | warning | the stop + attempted state | no | none (security/integrity audit) |
| `dispatch.stop_arrived_late` | warning | the stop + load + customer | no | none (operational alert; computed, not user-initiated) |
| `dispatch.stop_detention_threshold_exceeded` | warning | the stop + customer | no | none |
| `dispatch.load_legs_recomputed` | warning | the load + legs delta | yes | `dispatch.load_legs_recompute_blocked` |
| `dispatch.load_legs_recompute_blocked` | warning | the load | yes | success: `dispatch.load_legs_recomputed` |
| `dispatch.presettlement_composed` | info | the presettlement + composed_loads | no | none |
| `dispatch.presettlement_locked` | info | the presettlement | no | none |
| `dispatch.presettlement_unlocked` | warning | the presettlement | yes | `dispatch.presettlement_unlock_blocked` |
| `dispatch.presettlement_unlock_blocked` | warning | the presettlement | yes | success: `dispatch.presettlement_unlocked` |
| `dispatch.presettlement_discarded` | warning | the presettlement + released_loads | yes | `dispatch.presettlement_discard_blocked` |
| `dispatch.presettlement_discard_blocked` | warning | the presettlement | yes | success: `dispatch.presettlement_discarded` |
| `dispatch.deduction_held` | info | the presettlement + deduction_uuid + reason | no | none |
| `dispatch.settlement_posted` | warning | the settlement + presettlement + posted JEs reference | yes | `dispatch.settlement_post_blocked` |
| `dispatch.settlement_post_blocked` | warning | the presettlement + reason | yes | success: `dispatch.settlement_posted` |
| `dispatch.settlement_reversed` | warning | the original settlement + reversal record + reversal JEs | yes | `dispatch.settlement_reversal_blocked` |
| `dispatch.settlement_reversal_blocked` | warning | the settlement | yes | success: `dispatch.settlement_reversed` |
| `dispatch.intransit_issue_created` | severity matches issue severity (info/warning/critical) | the issue + load + driver + telematics_at_capture | no | none |
| `dispatch.intransit_issue_converted_to_wo` | info | the issue + new WO | no | none |
| `dispatch.intransit_issue_resolved_without_wo` | info | the issue + resolution_note | no | none |

**MUST 8a.0.9.1** — All event INSERTs go through `audit.append_event()` (per Part 4.9.3.2). Direct INSERT to `audit.audit_events` blocked by RLS.

**MUST 8a.0.9.2** — Per Cursor's locked WF-064 success/blocked symmetry rule: every WF-064 originated action emits BOTH a success variant (`{action}_executed` or `{action}_done` — naming convention is `_posted`, `_unlocked`, `_cancelled`, `_recomputed`, `_executed` etc. as appropriate to the action verb) AND a blocked variant (`{action}_blocked` or `{action}_reversal_blocked` etc.). All 8 originated WF-064 actions in §8a.0.7 Table A have explicit success+blocked pairs in this table.

**MUST 8a.0.9.3** — `before_state_json` and `after_state_json` MUST be populated for `load_cancelled`, `presettlement_unlocked`, `presettlement_discarded`, `settlement_posted`, `settlement_reversed`, `border_routing_set_deduct_executed`, `load_pay_recomputed`, `load_legs_recomputed` events. These are the WF-064 originated actions where audit replay matters most.

**MUST 8a.0.9.4** — `geofence_correlation_json` is preserved on `dispatch.stop_transitioned` events when source='geofence'. PWA-source events also get the correlation JSON if a geofence event arrived within ±60 seconds (per WF-043 ground-truth).

### 8a.0.10 Element 10: Parity tests

| Test ID | Description | WF traced | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| T-141.1 | Loads list filtered by status='active' returns only active loads; pagination works; RLS scopes drivers to self-assigned | WF-024 | 8a.0.2.1.4 + 8a.0.7.1 |
| T-141.2 | Driver caller SELECT loads returns only own assigned loads via RLS; different driver returns empty | WF-024 | 8a.0.7.1 + Part 4.4.3.1 |
| T-141.3 | GET /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid} for own load succeeds; for other driver returns E_NOT_FOUND (not 403; defends against existence-disclosure) | WF-024 | 8a.0.7.1 |
| T-141.4 | POST /api/dispatch/loads with assigned_unit but no assigned_driver → E_VALIDATION (dispatch atomicity per 4.4.2.2) | WF-024 | 8a.0.5.1 |
| T-141.5 | Load creation with HOS-violating driver → E_DRIVER_HOS_VIOLATION; samsara_link in details | WF-024 + WF-038 | 8a.0.5.6 |
| T-141.6 | Load creation with separated driver → E_DRIVER_INACTIVE | WF-024 | 8a.0.5.8 |
| T-141.7 | Load creation with retired unit → E_UNIT_RETIRED | WF-024 | 8a.0.5.9 |
| T-141.8 | Load creation with assigned_driver+unit fires WF-039 auto driver-bill in same transaction; bill linked via driver_bill_uuid | WF-039 | 8a.0.6 |
| T-141.9 | Load creation with unit having open PM-due WO returns wf_044_maintenance_warnings array; load creation succeeds (advisory only) | WF-044 | 8a.0.5.7 + 8a.0.2.3.7 |
| T-141.10 | Border-crossing pickup/delivery location auto-sets has_border_crossing=true and border_routing='pending' | WF-014 | 8a.0.2.3.3 |
| T-141.11 | PATCH /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid} on settled load → E_LOAD_ALREADY_SETTLED | WF-024 | 8a.0.5.5 |
| T-141.12 | Border-routing 'charge_to_customer' adds invoice line; emits dispatch.border_routing_set (info, no WF-064) | WF-014 | 8a.0.4 + 8a.0.6 |
| T-141.13 | Border-routing 'deduct_from_driver' fires WF-064; creates driver liability; emits dispatch.border_routing_set_deduct_executed (warning) + cross-module driver_finance.liability_created | WF-014 + WF-064 | 8a.0.4 + 8a.0.6 + 8a.0.7 (Table A row 1, Table B row 1) |
| T-141.14 | Border-routing deduct attempted by Manager (not Owner/Admin) → E_PERMISSION_DENIED; emits dispatch.border_routing_set_deduct_blocked (warning) — success/blocked symmetry | WF-064 | 8a.0.7 + 8a.0.9 (blocked variant) |
| T-141.15 | Border-routing deduct without amount_to_deduct → E_VALIDATION | WF-014 | 8a.0.4 |
| T-141.16 | Border-routing on load without has_border_crossing=true → E_LOAD_NOT_BORDER_CROSSING | WF-014 | 8a.0.4 |
| T-141.17 | Border-routing 'pay_to_driver' adds line to driver-bill via cross-module accounting service | WF-014 | 8a.0.6 |
| T-141.18 | Border-routing deduct UI shows 2-step confirmation modal with typed phrase 'DEDUCT' per Part 6.4.5.4 | WF-064 | 8a.0.2.4.3 |
| T-142.1 | Load close with all stops 'departed' + BOL+POD evidence → emits dispatch.load_closed + accounting.invoice_created + dispatch.factoring_packet_assembled atomically | WF-040 | 8a.0.4 |
| T-142.2 | Load close with incomplete stops → E_LOAD_STOPS_INCOMPLETE; lists incomplete stops in details | WF-040 | 8a.0.4 + 8a.0.5.4 |
| T-142.3 | Load close with border_routing='pending' → E_BORDER_ROUTING_PENDING | WF-014 + WF-040 | 8a.0.4 + 8a.0.5.4 |
| T-142.4 | Load close without BOL evidence → E_VALIDATION | WF-040 | 8a.0.4 |
| T-142.5 | Load close without POD evidence when generate_factoring_packet=true → E_VALIDATION | WF-040 | 8a.0.4 |
| T-142.6 | Factoring packet assembly creates documents bundle for export per WF-040 | WF-040 | 8a.0.6 + Part 9 Documents (TBD) |
| T-142.7 | Load cancel by Manager (allowed) → emits dispatch.load_cancelled (warning) + WF-064 Owner notification | WF-064 | 8a.0.4 + 8a.0.7 (Table A row 2) |
| T-142.8 | Load cancel by Dispatcher → E_PERMISSION_DENIED; emits dispatch.load_cancellation_blocked | WF-064 | 8a.0.7 + 8a.0.9 (blocked variant) |
| T-142.9 | Load cancel of settled load → E_LOAD_ALREADY_SETTLED; emits load_cancellation_blocked | WF-064 | 8a.0.5.5 + 8a.0.9 |
| T-142.10 | Load cancel of in-transit load with checked_in stop → E_LOAD_IN_TRANSIT_NOT_CANCELLABLE_INLINE | WF-064 | 8a.0.4 |
| T-142.11 | Load cancel with reverse_driver_bill=true fires cross-module accounting.reverse_bill credit memo | WF-064 | 8a.0.6 |
| T-143.1 | GET /api/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/stops returns ordered stops; RLS scopes drivers to self-assigned | WF-024 | 8a.0.7.1 |
| T-143.2 | Stop state transition forward (scheduled → en_route) succeeds; emits dispatch.stop_transitioned (info, sampled) | WF-043 | 8a.0.5.3 |
| T-143.3 | Stop state transition backward without source='correction' → E_STOP_STATE_TRANSITION_INVALID | WF-043 | 8a.0.5.3 |
| T-143.4 | Stop state transition backward with source='correction' + correction_reason ≥20 chars succeeds; appends new event (does NOT modify prior); emits dispatch.stop_state_corrected (warning) | WF-043 | 8a.0.5.3 + 8a.0.5.16 |
| T-143.5 | Stop transition while another stop is in-flight → E_STOP_SEQUENCE_VIOLATION (single-in-flight invariant) | WF-043 | 8a.0.5.2 + Part 4.4.2.3 |
| T-143.6 | UPDATE on dispatch.load_stop_events → RLS rejects regardless of role | WF-024 | 8a.0.5.16 |
| T-143.7 | DELETE on dispatch.load_stop_events → RLS rejects regardless of role | WF-024 | 8a.0.5.16 |
| T-143.8 | Stop arrived_at_source='geofence' computed from Samsara webhook with valid signature; load_stop_event source='geofence' | WF-043 | Part 5.2.4 + 8a.0.4 (geofence path) |
| T-143.9 | Stop arrived_at_source='driver_pwa' computed from PWA endpoint with valid driver session; load_stop_event source='driver_pwa' | WF-043 | 8a.0.4 (PWA path) |
| T-143.10 | Stop arrived >2h late (computed) → emits dispatch.stop_arrived_late warning + SMS to Manager+Dispatcher (Part 5.5.4.2 exception) | WF-043 | 8a.0.8.1 |
| T-143.11 | Geofence webhook within ±60s of PWA event → geofence_correlation_json contains BOTH events with timestamps + source IDs (per WF-043 ground-truth) | WF-043 | 8a.0.5.17 |
| T-143.12 | Geofence webhook with invalid Samsara signature → 401; no audit event written | WF-043 + Part 5.2.4 | Part 5.2.4 |
| T-143.13 | Detention threshold crossed → emits dispatch.stop_detention_threshold_exceeded (warning); uses customer's per-customer override per Part 7.2.2.7.3 | WF-043 | 8a.0.2.7 + 7.2.2.7.3 |

#### 8a.0.10.1 Dispatch-specific error codes

| Code | HTTP eq | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| `E_DRIVER_HOS_VIOLATION` | 409 | Driver currently has an active HOS violation; assignment blocked per WF-038 |
| `E_DRIVER_INACTIVE` | 422 | Driver status IN ('separated','blocked','on_leave'); cannot assign |
| `E_UNIT_RETIRED` | 422 | Unit status='retired'; cannot assign |
| `E_LOAD_NOT_BORDER_CROSSING` | 422 | Border-routing called on load without has_border_crossing=true |
| `E_LOAD_ALREADY_SETTLED` | 409 | Modification attempted on settled load; use Owner reverse-and-replace |
| `E_LOAD_IN_TRANSIT_NOT_CANCELLABLE_INLINE` | 409 | Cancel attempted on load with checked_in or further stop; requires Owner action |
| `E_LOAD_STOPS_INCOMPLETE` | 422 | Load close attempted with stops not at 'departed' state |
| `E_LOAD_NOT_DELIVERED` | 422 | Action requires load.status='delivered'; current status differs |
| `E_BORDER_ROUTING_PENDING` | 422 | Action requires border_routing != 'pending'; load close path |
| `E_BORDER_ROUTING_PENDING_BLOCKS_COMPOSITION` | 422 | Presettlement compose blocked by 1+ loads with border_routing='pending'; lists blocking loads |
| `E_STOP_SEQUENCE_VIOLATION` | 422 | Single-in-flight invariant violated per Part 4.4.2.3 |
| `E_STOP_STATE_TRANSITION_INVALID` | 422 | Backward state transition without source='correction' |
| `E_STOP_SEQUENCE_OVERLAP` | 409 | Adding extra stop with conflicting stop_sequence |
| `E_DRIVER_HAS_OPEN_PRESETTLEMENT` | 409 | Compose attempted while another presettlement is composed/locked |
| `E_PRESETTLEMENT_NOT_LOCKED` | 422 | Action requires status='locked'; current status differs |
| `E_PRESETTLEMENT_ALREADY_LOCKED` | 409 | Lock attempted on already-locked presettlement |
| `E_PRESETTLEMENT_ALREADY_SETTLED` | 409 | Action attempted on settled presettlement |
| `E_SETTLEMENT_NOT_REVERSIBLE_FOR_PERIOD` | 422 | Settlement cannot be reversed because original posting period is closed; reopen period first |
| `E_INTRANSIT_ISSUE_ALREADY_CONVERTED` | 409 | Convert attempted on already-converted issue |
| `E_INTRANSIT_ISSUE_ALREADY_RESOLVED` | 409 | Resolve attempted on already-resolved issue |
| `E_LOAD_ALREADY_RESPONDED` | 409 | PWA response attempted with different request_id after prior response |
| `E_VERSION_CONFLICT` | 409 | Optimistic concurrency: row was modified since loaded (per Part 4.0.2.2; baseline reused) |

## 8b.0 — DRIVER FINANCE MODULE PLACEMENT

Driver Finance is the canonical source of truth for driver debt, escrow, deductions, and advances. It originates the largest concentration of WF-064 high-risk actions in the system (10 originated) and is the consumer of dispatch settlement outputs. Its key constraint — the transactional debt authority rule from Part 4.5.4 — must be honored by every workflow listed in §4.5.4.2.

Part 8b covers these workflows from the Workflow Parity Checklist:

| WF | Name | Primary scope |
|---|---|---|
| WF-011 | Settlement with Debt Alert | Live recompute + red banner + acknowledgment lock |
| WF-015 | Cash Advance with Debt Context | Above-policy advance triggers WF-064 |
| WF-016 | Escrow Forfeiture (Pre-Clause vs Post-Clause) | Split-bucket forfeiture per Part 4.5.4 |
| WF-017 | Deduction Schedule Override | Owner-action with audit trail |
| WF-035 | Company Paid Driver Expense Recovery | Liability + deduction schedule creation |
| WF-036 | Driver Terms Acceptance Capture | Liability acknowledgment via PWA or PDF sign |
| WF-037 | Driver Liability Disposition | Forfeit / write-off / refund / paid (terminal states) |
| WF-046 | Driver Earnings Live Recompute | The Part 4.5.4.3 mandatory live-recompute API |
| WF-054 | Above-Policy Advance Approval | Owner-only override |
| WF-055 | Settlement Lock with Stale Debt Refresh | Part 4.5.4.5 UI contract enforcement |
| WF-056 | Liability Pre/Post Clause Bucket Routing | New liabilities routed per forfeiture clause status |
| WF-057 | Equipment-Loss Liability Creation | Inherited from Master Data §7.2 + Part 3.13.3.7 |

Cross-cuts WF-024 (RBAC) per all modules. Cross-cuts WF-064 (high-risk audit) extensively.

---

## 8b.1 — DRIVER FINANCE MODULE

### 8b.1.1 Element 1: Module overview

**Purpose:** Driver Finance owns the financial relationship between IH 35 Transportation LLC and its drivers as independent contractors / driver-vendors. It is the source of truth for:
- Active driver debt (liabilities of various types: equipment loss, ticket recovery, fuel card overage, advance balance, etc.)
- Escrow account balances (split into pre-clause and post-clause buckets per Part 3.13.3.4 + 4.5.4)
- Deduction schedules (multi-payment plans applied at settlement time)
- Cash advances against future earnings
- Driver settlement line items (created from dispatch settlement at finalization)

The module is invariant-rich because it underpins the company's most sensitive operational relationships. Errors here directly affect driver paychecks and the company's accounts payable to drivers.

**Owning schema:** `driver_finance` (per Part 4.5).

**Key invariants:**
- Liability `current_balance` is monotonically non-increasing toward zero from the active state; only Owner reversal flow can re-open a closed liability (per Part 4.5.2.1).
- Escrow ledger is append-only; balance is computed from sum of ledger rows, not stored as a single mutable cell (per Part 4.5.2.2 + 4.5.2.3 + WF-016).
- Escrow split: every escrow entry MUST be tagged `bucket = 'pre_clause' | 'post_clause'` based on `forfeiture_clause_active` status at the time of entry (per Part 4.5.2.4 + 3.13.3.4 + WF-056). Forfeiture operates on `pre_clause` bucket only.
- Deduction schedule `applied_amount` MUST NOT exceed `total_amount`; when equal, schedule transitions to `status = 'completed'` (per Part 4.5.2.5).
- Deduction schedule overrides require Owner action with reason ≥20 chars (per Part 4.5.2.6 + WF-017 + WF-064).
- Cash advance above the per-driver policy ceiling (`master_data.drivers.advance_policy_limit`) requires Owner action with reason and explicit "above_policy" flag (per Part 4.5.2.7 + WF-054 + WF-064).
- Liability disposition is one-way to terminal state (`forfeited`, `written_off`, `refunded`, `paid`); no demotion (per Part 4.5.2.8 + WF-037).
- Settlement lines are one-way from Dispatch; corrections require Owner reversal flow (per Part 4.5.2.9 + Part 4.4.2.6).
- Driver pay catalog version pinned at load creation per Part 4.4.2.10 — Driver Finance honors this pinning when computing settlement detail; override only via Owner action.
- **Transactional debt authority (Part 4.5.4):** every workflow in §4.5.4.2 MUST call `driver_finance.recompute_driver_debt(driver_uuid)` synchronously and use its return value, NOT the cache on `master_data.drivers`. The cache is reporting-only.

**Cross-module dependencies:**
- READS from canonical reference: `master_data.drivers` (driver status + escrow_target + advance_policy_limit + forfeiture_clause_active flag), `master_data.equipment` (when equipment-loss liability is being created), `catalogs.driver_pay_catalog` (for pay computation in settlement context), `catalogs.account_role_bindings` (for posting account resolution).
- READS from `dispatch.settlements` and `dispatch.presettlements` (settlement line consumption).
- WRITES to (via service functions): `accounting.journal_entry_lines` (every liability creation, deduction application, escrow movement, advance disbursement posts to GL via `accounting.post()`); `accounting.bills` (driver-vendor bill lines for advances + reimbursements via `accounting.create_driver_vendor_bill_line()`); `documents.evidence_records` (for liability acknowledgment artifacts).
- WRITES to `master_data.drivers` debt cache columns ONLY via `driver_finance.recompute_driver_debt()` trigger path; direct UPDATE blocked by trigger per Part 4.2.2.7.
- WRITES to `audit.audit_events` via `audit.append_event()`.
- WRITES to `outbox.queue` (QBO sync of bills + journal entries via standard accounting flow per Part 3.12.4.8).

**WFs implemented:** WF-011, WF-015, WF-016, WF-017, WF-035, WF-036, WF-037, WF-046, WF-054, WF-055, WF-056, WF-057. Cross-cuts WF-024 (RBAC) + WF-064 (high-risk).

### 8b.1.2 Element 2: UI behaviors

#### 8b.1.2.1 Driver Finance home (`/driver-finance`)

**MUST 8b.1.2.1.1 — Section header:** "DRIVER FINANCE" per Part 6.2.3.

**MUST 8b.1.2.1.2 — KPI cards row** per Part 6.2.4: total active debt across all drivers (cached, reporting context per 4.5.4.1), drivers above debt tolerance threshold (cached), open liabilities pending acknowledgment (cached), advances disbursed this period (live computed), escrow total balance pre-clause + post-clause (live computed).

**MUST 8b.1.2.1.3 — Drivers attention list:** drivers with debt > policy threshold OR pending unacknowledged liabilities OR active deduction schedules near completion. Each row links to the driver detail (master_data side) AND to the driver's debt detail (driver_finance side).

#### 8b.1.2.2 Driver debt detail (`/driver-finance/drivers/{driver_uuid}`)

**MUST 8b.1.2.2.1 — Tabs:** Liabilities (active + closed), Escrow (pre-clause + post-clause split), Deductions, Advances, Settlement History, Audit.

**MUST 8b.1.2.2.2 — Live debt header:** at the top of every tab, displays `total_active_debt` from a fresh call to `driver_finance.recompute_driver_debt()` per Part 4.5.4.3 + 4.5.4.5. MUST display `computed_at` timestamp ("Debt computed 4 seconds ago"). If page is open >5 seconds without refresh, debt amount is masked and a "Refresh" button appears; the masked state blocks confirm buttons on operational forms below. This is the Part 4.5.4.5 UI contract enforcement (WF-055).

**MUST 8b.1.2.2.3 — Liabilities tab:** lists all `driver_finance.driver_liabilities` rows for this driver. Active liabilities shown first (status='active' or 'partially_paid'); closed liabilities (`forfeited`, `written_off`, `refunded`, `paid`) collapsed by default with expand-to-view. Each row shows: liability_type badge, original_amount, current_balance, created_at, source_event (linked — equipment_loss → master_data.equipment row, etc.), acknowledgment status badge, deduction schedule link (if any), actions hover dropdown.

**MUST 8b.1.2.2.4 — Liability actions:** view detail, request acknowledgment (queues PWA notification or generates PDF for sign per WF-036), edit balance (lightning-bolt ⚡ WF-064 — only when source justifies it; emits warning), apply payment, dispose (lightning-bolt ⚡ WF-064 — terminal state transition).

**MUST 8b.1.2.2.5 — Escrow tab:** displays the ledger as two columns (pre-clause | post-clause) with running balances. Each row: timestamp, action (deposit, withdrawal, forfeit, refund), amount, related entity (e.g. settlement_uuid), bucket (pre/post). Read-only display of all rows; mutations via dedicated action buttons.

**MUST 8b.1.2.2.6 — Forfeiture controls** (per WF-016): "Forfeit Pre-Clause Escrow" button. Lightning-bolt ⚡ WF-064. Only enabled when `forfeiture_clause_active = true` on the driver AND `bucket='pre_clause'` balance > 0. 2-step confirmation modal per Part 6.4.5.4 with typed phrase "FORFEIT ESCROW" + reason ≥20 chars. Owner-only.

**MUST 8b.1.2.2.7 — Refund controls:** "Refund Escrow" button — refunds from `bucket='post_clause'` allowed for any office role with reason; refunds from `bucket='pre_clause'` blocked entirely (this is what forfeiture is for; refunds of pre-clause escrow are not a normal flow).

**MUST 8b.1.2.2.8 — Deductions tab:** lists active and completed deduction schedules. Each row: liability/advance source (linked), total_amount, applied_amount, remaining, per_settlement_amount, status badge, override history (count + link to audit log). Actions: view detail, override (lightning-bolt ⚡ WF-064 per WF-017), pause (lightning-bolt ⚡ WF-064 — pause variant of override), resume.

**MUST 8b.1.2.2.9 — Advances tab:** lists driver_advances with status (outstanding, paid_off, written_off). "Issue Advance" button at top: standard advance flow (within policy limit) is Owner+Admin+Manager; above-policy variant lightning-bolt ⚡ WF-064 (WF-054), Owner-only.

#### 8b.1.2.3 Settlement debt-alert flow (`/dispatch/loads/{uuid}/settlement` integration)

This UI is owned by Dispatch (per Part 8a §8a.0.2.6) but the debt-alert behavior originates from Driver Finance per WF-011 + Part 3.13.8.

**MUST 8b.1.2.3.1 — Live recompute on settlement page load:** the settlement screen MUST call `driver_finance.recompute_driver_debt(driver_uuid)` synchronously when rendered. The returned `total_active_debt` and `pending_ack_liability_count` are used for ALL banner and lock decisions. The cache from `master_data.drivers` MUST NOT be referenced for this screen (per Part 4.5.4.2 enumeration).

**MUST 8b.1.2.3.2 — Red debt banner:** if `total_active_debt > 0`, a red banner per Part 6.4.4 (Severe color) appears at the top of the settlement preview. Text: "Driver has $X.XX in active debt. Y pending liability acknowledgments." Banner displays `computed_at` timestamp inline.

**MUST 8b.1.2.3.3 — Acknowledgment lock:** if `pending_ack_liability_count > 0`, the "Finalize Settlement" button is disabled. A note explains: "Driver must acknowledge N pending liability/liabilities before settlement can be finalized." Each pending liability is listed with a link to "Send acknowledgment request" (WF-036 trigger).

**MUST 8b.1.2.3.4 — Stale-debt lockout (WF-055 + Part 4.5.4.5):** if the page is open >5 seconds without action, the displayed debt amount is masked with "Refreshing..." and the Finalize button is disabled. A "Refresh" button forces a new live recompute. The Finalize button re-enables only when `computed_at` is within the 5-second freshness window.

#### 8b.1.2.4 Cash advance flow (`/driver-finance/advances/new`)

**MUST 8b.1.2.4.1 — Driver picker + live debt context:** form starts with driver picker; on driver selection, page calls `driver_finance.recompute_driver_debt()` for the selected driver and displays current debt + escrow balances + advance_policy_limit.

**MUST 8b.1.2.4.2 — Within-policy flow:** advance amount within `advance_policy_limit - existing_outstanding_advance_balance` proceeds with standard form. Submit creates `driver_finance.driver_advances` row + posts to AP via `accounting.create_driver_vendor_bill_line()`.

**MUST 8b.1.2.4.3 — Above-policy flow (WF-054):** if requested amount exceeds policy headroom, form switches mode: title becomes "Above-Policy Advance Request", lightning-bolt ⚡ appears, "above_policy=true" required in body, reason field required (≥30 chars for above-policy vs ≥10 chars for standard). Submit triggers WF-064 with 2-step confirmation modal per Part 6.4.5.4 with typed phrase "APPROVE ABOVE-POLICY ADVANCE". Owner-only role.

#### 8b.1.2.5 Liability acknowledgment PWA flow

**MUST 8b.1.2.5.1 — Driver notification:** when a liability is created OR an acknowledgment request is sent, the driver's PWA receives an in-app notification + push (if PWA push enabled per Part 5.5).

**MUST 8b.1.2.5.2 — Acknowledgment screen (PWA):** displays the liability details (type, original_amount, current_balance, source_event description, deduction schedule preview if any). The driver may:
- Tap "I acknowledge" → records `acknowledged_at` + writes `documents.evidence_records` row of type `liability_acknowledgment_pwa` per Part 3.17 chain-of-custody. Emits `driver_finance.liability_acknowledged` info audit.
- Tap "Sign PDF instead" → generates PDF for download/print; PDF tracked separately as evidence type `liability_acknowledgment_signed_pdf`.
- Tap "Dispute" → opens issue form; creates an `audit.audit_events` warning entry for office review; does NOT acknowledge.

**MUST 8b.1.2.5.3 — Repeated reminders:** unacknowledged liabilities trigger reminder pushes on a 24h, 72h, 7d schedule until acknowledged or office-side disposed. Per Part 5.5.4.2, none of these meet the SMS bar (email + PWA push only).

#### 8b.1.2.6 Deduction schedule override flow (WF-017)

**MUST 8b.1.2.6.1 — Override modal:** lightning-bolt ⚡ WF-064. 2-step confirmation per Part 6.4.5.4 with typed phrase "OVERRIDE DEDUCTION" + reason ≥20 chars. Form fields: new_per_settlement_amount, optional pause_until_date, reason. Owner-only by default; Manager+Owner combination allowed if delta from current per_settlement_amount is within ±10%.

**MUST 8b.1.2.6.2 — Override audit display:** the deduction schedule detail page shows full override history with timestamps, actor user_ids, before/after values, and reasons. Override history is read-only (append-only ledger).

### 8b.1.3 Element 3: Data entities

The Driver Finance module owns these tables (DDL in Part 4.5.1, NOT redefined here):

- `driver_finance.driver_liabilities` — canonical driver-debt record; one row per liability event
- `driver_finance.driver_liability_dispositions` — append-only disposition log (forfeit/write-off/refund/paid transitions)
- `driver_finance.driver_advances` — cash advances; status transitions (outstanding → paid_off | written_off)
- `driver_finance.driver_settlement_lines` — settlement detail rows created from dispatch
- `driver_finance.escrow_ledger` — append-only escrow movement log; balance computed via aggregate
- `driver_finance.deduction_schedules` — payment plans applied at settlement time
- `driver_finance.deduction_schedule_overrides` — append-only override audit ledger

The Driver Finance module reads from these canonical reference tables in other schemas:
- `master_data.drivers` — driver status, escrow_target, advance_policy_limit, forfeiture_clause_active
- `master_data.equipment` — for equipment-loss liability source linkage
- `catalogs.driver_pay_catalog`, `catalogs.account_role_bindings`

The Driver Finance module reads from these other schemas (settlement consumption):
- `dispatch.settlements`, `dispatch.presettlements` — for settlement line creation

The Driver Finance module writes (via service functions only) to these schemas:
- `accounting.journal_entry_lines` (via `accounting.post()`)
- `accounting.bills` + `accounting.bill_lines` (via `accounting.create_driver_vendor_bill_line()`)
- `documents.evidence_records` (via `documents.evidence_create()` for acknowledgment artifacts)
- `master_data.drivers` debt cache (via `driver_finance.recompute_driver_debt()` trigger only — direct UPDATE blocked by trigger per Part 4.2.2.7)

The Driver Finance module writes to shared schemas:
- `audit.audit_events` (via `audit.append_event()`)
- `outbox.queue` (transitively via `accounting.post()` for QBO sync)

**No new tables introduced beyond Part 4.5 DDL.** Schema lock per Part 4 Rev 2 honored. The 7 tables above ARE the driver_finance schema in full.

### 8b.1.4 Element 4: API contracts

#### `POST /api/driver-finance/drivers/{driver_uuid}/recompute-debt`

The mandatory live-recompute endpoint per Part 4.5.4.3-4.5.4.5 (WF-046). Every transactional context that needs current debt MUST call this; every UI screen displaying debt for a transactional decision MUST display the returned `computed_at` timestamp.

**Authentication:** Active session cookie.

**Permission:** `driver_finance.debt.recompute` (any role with read access to the driver's debt; effectively Owner, Admin, Manager, Accountant for any driver; Driver for self).

**Example request:**
```http
POST /api/driver-finance/drivers/01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042/recompute-debt
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
```

(No request body; URL identifies the driver.)

**Example success response (200):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042",
    "computed_at": "2026-05-02T20:30:00.123Z",
    "total_active_debt": 1287.50,
    "pending_ack_liability_count": 2,
    "active_liability_count": 4,
    "escrow_balance": 950.00,
    "escrow_balance_pre_clause": 750.00,
    "escrow_balance_post_clause": 200.00,
    "outstanding_advance_balance": 500.00,
    "advance_policy_limit": 1500.00,
    "advance_policy_headroom": 1000.00,
    "deduction_schedule_active_count": 3,
    "cache_was_stale": true,
    "cache_drift_amount": 12.50,
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi30"
  }
}
```

**Example validation error response (400):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_VALIDATION",
    "message": "Recompute request invalid",
    "details": [{"field": "driver_uuid", "reason": "must be a valid UUID"}],
    "request_id": "req_01923ce0"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (404, driver not found):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_DRIVER_NOT_FOUND",
    "message": "Driver not found",
    "details": {"driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d999"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce0"
  }
}
```

**Example permission error response (403):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PERMISSION_DENIED",
    "message": "Action 'driver_finance.debt.recompute' requires Owner, Administrator, Manager, Accountant role for any driver, or Driver for self",
    "details": {"caller_role": "driver", "caller_driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d055", "target_driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce0"
  }
}
```

**Error code linkage:** `E_VALIDATION`, `E_DRIVER_NOT_FOUND` (8b.1.10.1), `E_PERMISSION_DENIED` (baseline). On success, emits `driver_finance.live_debt_recompute` (info, sampled at 10% per Part 4.5.4.6). If `cache_drift_amount > 0`, additionally emits `audit.cache_drift_detected` (warning) with delta.

---

#### `POST /api/driver-finance/liabilities`

Create a new driver liability. The most common path (equipment loss) is invoked via service function from Master Data (`master_data.equipment.report_loss` per Part 7.2 — inherited WF-064 entry). This endpoint exists for direct creation by office roles for other liability types (ticket recovery, fuel card overage, etc.).

**Authentication:** Active session cookie.

**Permission:** `driver_finance.liability.create` (Owner, Admin, Manager, Accountant).

**Example request:**
```http
POST /api/driver-finance/liabilities
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042",
  "liability_type": "ticket_recovery",
  "original_amount": 285.00,
  "source_description": "Speeding ticket on I-35 dated 2026-04-28 paid by company; recovering from driver per WF-035",
  "source_evidence_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000evid040",
  "create_deduction_schedule": true,
  "deduction_schedule": {
    "per_settlement_amount": 50.00,
    "max_settlements": 6
  }
}
```

**Example success response (201):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000liab001",
    "display_id": "DL-25040",
    "driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042",
    "liability_type": "ticket_recovery",
    "original_amount": 285.00,
    "current_balance": 285.00,
    "status": "active",
    "bucket_routing": "post_clause",
    "ack_required": true,
    "acknowledged_at": null,
    "deduction_schedule_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000dsch01",
    "created_at": "2026-05-02T20:35:00Z",
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi31",
    "transaction_summary": {
      "liability_inserted": true,
      "deduction_schedule_inserted": true,
      "journal_entry_posted": true,
      "ack_request_queued": true,
      "all_in_single_transaction": true
    }
  }
}
```

**Example validation error response (400):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_VALIDATION",
    "message": "Liability creation request invalid",
    "details": [
      {"field": "liability_type", "reason": "must be one of: equipment_loss, ticket_recovery, fuel_card_overage, advance_balance, expense_recovery, other"},
      {"field": "original_amount", "reason": "must be > 0"},
      {"field": "deduction_schedule.per_settlement_amount", "reason": "must be > 0 and <= original_amount"}
    ],
    "request_id": "req_01923ce1"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (422, driver inactive):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_DRIVER_INACTIVE_FOR_LIABILITY",
    "message": "Cannot create liability for driver in status 'separated'; use Owner reversal flow",
    "details": {"driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042", "driver_status": "separated"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce1"
  }
}
```

**Example permission error response (403):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PERMISSION_DENIED",
    "message": "Action 'driver_finance.liability.create' requires Owner, Administrator, Manager, or Accountant role",
    "details": {"caller_role": "dispatcher"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce1"
  }
}
```

**Error code linkage:** `E_VALIDATION`, `E_DRIVER_INACTIVE_FOR_LIABILITY` (8b.1.10.1), `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`. On success, emits `driver_finance.liability_created` (info), `driver_finance.deduction_schedule_created` (info), and posts journal entry via `accounting.post()` (which emits `accounting.journal_entry_posted` info). If acknowledgment requested, queues `notifications.pwa_push_dispatched` (info, sampled). Liability bucket_routing computed at insert: if `master_data.drivers.forfeiture_clause_active = true`, bucket_routing = `post_clause`; else `pre_clause` per WF-056.

---

#### `POST /api/driver-finance/liabilities/{uuid}/acknowledge`

Driver acknowledges a liability via PWA (or office-staff records signed-PDF acknowledgment per WF-036).

**Authentication:** Active session cookie.

**Permission:** `driver_finance.liability.acknowledge` (the linked driver via PWA self; OR Owner+Admin+Manager when recording signed PDF on driver's behalf).

**Example request (driver self via PWA):**
```http
POST /api/driver-finance/liabilities/01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000liab001/acknowledge
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "acknowledgment_method": "pwa_tap",
  "evidence_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000evid045"
}
```

**Example request (office records signed PDF):**
```http
POST /api/driver-finance/liabilities/01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000liab001/acknowledge
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "acknowledgment_method": "signed_pdf",
  "evidence_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000evid046",
  "signed_at": "2026-05-02T15:30:00Z",
  "office_recorder_user_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000usr01",
  "office_recorder_note": "Driver Carlos signed paper copy in office; scanned and uploaded"
}
```

**Example success response (200):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "liability_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000liab001",
    "acknowledged_at": "2026-05-02T20:40:00Z",
    "acknowledgment_method": "pwa_tap",
    "evidence_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000evid045",
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi32"
  }
}
```

**Example validation error response (400):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_VALIDATION",
    "message": "Acknowledgment request invalid",
    "details": [
      {"field": "acknowledgment_method", "reason": "must be one of: pwa_tap, signed_pdf, signed_paper_office"},
      {"field": "evidence_uuid", "reason": "evidence record not found or not of expected type"}
    ],
    "request_id": "req_01923ce2"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (409, already acknowledged):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_LIABILITY_ALREADY_ACKNOWLEDGED",
    "message": "Liability already acknowledged at 2026-05-01T14:20:00Z",
    "details": {"acknowledged_at": "2026-05-01T14:20:00Z", "acknowledgment_method": "signed_pdf"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce2"
  }
}
```

**Example permission error response (403):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PERMISSION_DENIED",
    "message": "Action 'driver_finance.liability.acknowledge' requires the linked driver (PWA self) or office role (signed PDF recording)",
    "details": {"caller_role": "driver", "caller_driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d055", "liability_driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce2"
  }
}
```

**Error code linkage:** `E_VALIDATION`, `E_LIABILITY_ALREADY_ACKNOWLEDGED` (8b.1.10.1), `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`. On success, emits `driver_finance.liability_acknowledged` (info) with `acknowledgment_method` field; updates driver cache via `recompute_driver_debt()` trigger (decrements pending_ack_liability_count).

---

#### `POST /api/driver-finance/liabilities/{uuid}/dispose`

Transition a liability to a terminal state: `forfeited`, `written_off`, `refunded`, or `paid`. **Fires WF-064 — high-risk action (Part 6.8.2 enumeration item 17).**

**Authentication:** Active session cookie.

**Permission:** `driver_finance.liability.dispose` (Owner only by default; Admin allowed for `paid` disposition only when applied via routine deduction schedule completion).

**Example request:**
```http
POST /api/driver-finance/liabilities/01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000liab001/dispose
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "to_status": "written_off",
  "reason": "Driver Carlos separated from company on 2026-05-02 with $185 outstanding on ticket-recovery liability; uncollectible; writing off per Owner directive after collection attempts exhausted"
}
```

**Example success response (200):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "liability_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000liab001",
    "from_status": "active",
    "to_status": "written_off",
    "current_balance_at_disposition": 185.00,
    "disposed_at": "2026-05-02T20:45:00Z",
    "disposition_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000disp001",
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi33",
    "wf_064_owner_notification": {"fired": true, "notification_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000notif10"},
    "transaction_summary": {
      "liability_status_updated": true,
      "disposition_log_inserted": true,
      "deduction_schedule_cancelled_if_active": true,
      "journal_entry_reversed_or_written_off": true
    }
  }
}
```

**Example validation error response (400):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_VALIDATION",
    "message": "Dispose request invalid",
    "details": [
      {"field": "to_status", "reason": "must be one of: forfeited, written_off, refunded, paid"},
      {"field": "reason", "reason": "required; minimum 20 characters"}
    ],
    "request_id": "req_01923ce3"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (422, invalid disposition):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_LIABILITY_DISPOSITION_INVALID",
    "message": "Cannot dispose liability already in terminal state 'paid' (per Part 4.5.2.8 one-way transition)",
    "details": {"current_status": "paid", "disposed_at": "2026-04-15T10:00:00Z"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce3"
  }
}
```

**Example permission error response (403):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PERMISSION_DENIED",
    "message": "Action 'driver_finance.liability.dispose' to status 'written_off' requires Owner role",
    "details": {"caller_role": "administrator", "to_status": "written_off"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce3"
  }
}
```

**Error code linkage:** `E_VALIDATION`, `E_LIABILITY_DISPOSITION_INVALID` (8b.1.10.1), `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`. On success, emits `driver_finance.liability_dispositioned` (warning, fires WF-064). On block, emits `driver_finance.liability_disposition_blocked` (warning, fires WF-064 — success/blocked symmetry per Part 6.8.3). Cancels associated deduction schedule if active (status → cancelled). Posts journal entry reversal/write-off via `accounting.post()`.

---

#### `POST /api/driver-finance/escrow/forfeit`

Forfeit pre-clause escrow (per WF-016 + Part 3.13.3.4). **Fires WF-064 — high-risk action (Part 6.8.2 enumeration item 14).**

**Authentication:** Active session cookie.

**Permission:** `driver_finance.escrow.forfeit` (Owner only).

**Example request:**
```http
POST /api/driver-finance/escrow/forfeit
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042",
  "amount": 750.00,
  "reason": "Driver Carlos separated from company on 2026-05-02 with active forfeiture clause; pre-clause escrow balance forfeited per signed agreement dated 2026-04-12"
}
```

**Example success response (200):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042",
    "escrow_ledger_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000eled001",
    "amount_forfeited": 750.00,
    "bucket": "pre_clause",
    "balance_pre_clause_after": 0.00,
    "balance_post_clause_after": 200.00,
    "forfeited_at": "2026-05-02T20:50:00Z",
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi34",
    "wf_064_owner_notification": {"fired": true, "notification_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000notif11"}
  }
}
```

**Example validation error response (400):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_VALIDATION",
    "message": "Forfeit request invalid",
    "details": [
      {"field": "amount", "reason": "must be > 0 and <= balance_pre_clause"},
      {"field": "reason", "reason": "required; minimum 20 characters"}
    ],
    "request_id": "req_01923ce4"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (422, clause not active):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_FORFEITURE_CLAUSE_NOT_ACTIVE",
    "message": "Cannot forfeit escrow for driver without active forfeiture clause",
    "details": {"driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042", "forfeiture_clause_active": false},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce4"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (409, insufficient pre-clause balance):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PRE_CLAUSE_ESCROW_INSUFFICIENT",
    "message": "Requested forfeiture amount exceeds pre-clause escrow balance",
    "details": {"requested_amount": 1000.00, "pre_clause_balance": 750.00},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce4"
  }
}
```

**Example permission error response (403):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PERMISSION_DENIED",
    "message": "Action 'driver_finance.escrow.forfeit' requires Owner role",
    "details": {"caller_role": "administrator"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce4"
  }
}
```

**Error code linkage:** `E_VALIDATION`, `E_FORFEITURE_CLAUSE_NOT_ACTIVE` (8b.1.10.1), `E_PRE_CLAUSE_ESCROW_INSUFFICIENT` (8b.1.10.1), `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`. On success, emits `driver_finance.escrow_forfeited` (warning, fires WF-064). On block, emits `driver_finance.escrow_forfeiture_blocked` (warning, fires WF-064 — success/blocked symmetry). Posts journal entry via `accounting.post()` (debit escrow liability account, credit company forfeiture revenue account per Part 3.13.3.4 + catalog role binding).

---

#### `POST /api/driver-finance/deduction-schedules/{uuid}/override`

Override an existing deduction schedule (change per_settlement_amount, pause, resume). **Fires WF-064 — high-risk action (Part 6.8.2 enumeration item 13).**

**Authentication:** Active session cookie.

**Permission:** `driver_finance.deduction_schedule.override` (Owner only by default; Manager+Owner allowed when delta from current per_settlement_amount is within ±10% per 8b.1.2.6.1).

**Example request:**
```http
POST /api/driver-finance/deduction-schedules/01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000dsch01/override
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "override_type": "amount_change",
  "new_per_settlement_amount": 75.00,
  "reason": "Driver Carlos requested faster payoff after pay raise; increasing per-settlement deduction from $50 to $75 per Owner approval"
}
```

**Example request (pause variant):**
```http
POST /api/driver-finance/deduction-schedules/01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000dsch01/override
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "override_type": "pause",
  "pause_until": "2026-06-01",
  "reason": "Driver on medical leave through 2026-05-31; pausing deductions per Owner directive to avoid hardship"
}
```

**Example success response (200):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "deduction_schedule_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000dsch01",
    "override_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000dovr001",
    "override_type": "amount_change",
    "previous_per_settlement_amount": 50.00,
    "new_per_settlement_amount": 75.00,
    "overridden_at": "2026-05-02T20:55:00Z",
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi35",
    "wf_064_owner_notification": {"fired": true, "notification_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000notif12"}
  }
}
```

**Example validation error response (400):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_VALIDATION",
    "message": "Override request invalid",
    "details": [
      {"field": "override_type", "reason": "must be one of: amount_change, pause, resume, cancel"},
      {"field": "new_per_settlement_amount", "reason": "required when override_type=amount_change; must be > 0"},
      {"field": "reason", "reason": "required; minimum 20 characters"}
    ],
    "request_id": "req_01923ce5"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (422, schedule completed):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_DEDUCTION_SCHEDULE_TERMINAL",
    "message": "Cannot override deduction schedule in status 'completed' or 'cancelled'",
    "details": {"current_status": "completed", "completed_at": "2026-04-30T18:00:00Z"},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce5"
  }
}
```

**Example permission error response (403):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PERMISSION_DENIED",
    "message": "Action 'driver_finance.deduction_schedule.override' requires Owner role (or Manager when delta within ±10%)",
    "details": {"caller_role": "manager", "delta_pct": 50.0, "max_manager_delta_pct": 10.0},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce5"
  }
}
```

**Error code linkage:** `E_VALIDATION`, `E_DEDUCTION_SCHEDULE_TERMINAL` (8b.1.10.1), `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`. On success, emits `driver_finance.deduction_schedule_overridden` (warning, fires WF-064). On block, emits `driver_finance.deduction_schedule_override_blocked` (warning, fires WF-064 — success/blocked symmetry). Inserts row into append-only `driver_finance.deduction_schedule_overrides` log.

---

#### `POST /api/driver-finance/advances`

Issue a cash advance to a driver. Two paths: standard (within policy limit) and above-policy (WF-054 — fires WF-064).

**Authentication:** Active session cookie.

**Permission:** `driver_finance.advance.create` (Owner, Admin, Manager) for standard; `driver_finance.advance.create.above_policy` (Owner only) for above-policy variant.

**Example request (standard within-policy):**
```http
POST /api/driver-finance/advances
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042",
  "amount": 500.00,
  "reason": "Standard cash advance against next settlement; within $1500 policy limit (driver headroom: $1000)",
  "above_policy": false,
  "create_deduction_schedule": true,
  "deduction_per_settlement_amount": 250.00
}
```

**Example request (above-policy — WF-064):**
```http
POST /api/driver-finance/advances
Authorization: Bearer {jwt}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042",
  "amount": 2000.00,
  "reason": "Above-policy advance approved by Owner; driver Carlos has emergency medical situation requiring $2000 immediate; will be deducted at $400/settlement over 5 settlements; policy limit is $1500 but Owner judgment is to extend",
  "above_policy": true,
  "create_deduction_schedule": true,
  "deduction_per_settlement_amount": 400.00
}
```

**Example success response (201):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000adv001",
    "display_id": "ADV-25040",
    "driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042",
    "amount": 500.00,
    "outstanding_balance": 500.00,
    "status": "outstanding",
    "above_policy": false,
    "deduction_schedule_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000dsch02",
    "issued_at": "2026-05-02T21:00:00Z",
    "bill_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000bill015",
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi36",
    "wf_064_owner_notification": {"fired": false, "reason": "within policy"}
  }
}
```

**Example success response (201 — above-policy):**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000adv002",
    "display_id": "ADV-25041",
    "driver_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000000d042",
    "amount": 2000.00,
    "outstanding_balance": 2000.00,
    "status": "outstanding",
    "above_policy": true,
    "deduction_schedule_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000dsch03",
    "issued_at": "2026-05-02T21:05:00Z",
    "bill_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000bill016",
    "audit_event_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-00000audi37",
    "wf_064_owner_notification": {"fired": true, "notification_uuid": "01923c8a-7f12-7000-8000-0000notif13"}
  }
}
```

**Example validation error response (400):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_VALIDATION",
    "message": "Advance request invalid",
    "details": [
      {"field": "amount", "reason": "must be > 0"},
      {"field": "reason", "reason": "required; minimum 30 characters when above_policy=true; minimum 10 characters otherwise"},
      {"field": "deduction_per_settlement_amount", "reason": "required when create_deduction_schedule=true"}
    ],
    "request_id": "req_01923ce6"
  }
}
```

**Example business error response (422, policy violation without flag):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_ADVANCE_EXCEEDS_POLICY",
    "message": "Requested amount exceeds driver's policy headroom; set above_policy=true and provide ≥30-char reason for Owner-approval flow",
    "details": {
      "requested_amount": 2000.00,
      "policy_limit": 1500.00,
      "existing_outstanding_balance": 500.00,
      "policy_headroom": 1000.00,
      "above_policy_required": true
    },
    "request_id": "req_01923ce6"
  }
}
```

**Example permission error response (403, above-policy by Manager):**
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "E_PERMISSION_DENIED",
    "message": "Action 'driver_finance.advance.create.above_policy' requires Owner role",
    "details": {"caller_role": "manager", "above_policy": true},
    "request_id": "req_01923ce6"
  }
}
```

**Error code linkage:** `E_VALIDATION`, `E_ADVANCE_EXCEEDS_POLICY` (8b.1.10.1), `E_PERMISSION_DENIED`. On success (standard), emits `driver_finance.advance_issued` (info). On success (above-policy), emits `driver_finance.advance_above_policy_issued` (warning, fires WF-064). On block of above-policy by non-Owner, emits `driver_finance.advance_above_policy_blocked` (warning, fires WF-064 — success/blocked symmetry). Creates AP bill via `accounting.create_driver_vendor_bill_line()`. Optional deduction schedule created in same transaction.
